name: Team Kathy
subject: Trivia question for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
How many women represent North Carolina in the House?
|
---

| | Question: How many women represent North Carolina in the U.S. House of Representatives? **The answer:_only two._** There's a silver lining though -- this grassroots team has the power to change that by sending Kathy to Congress in November. [_**If you can, chip in before the end-of-deadline tonight to give North Carolinians leadership we need.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d310/3d199a51/2f4a0661/7364febf/2825404289/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQzMGFtIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ%3D%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200430am?refcode=kme200430am_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d310/3d199a51/2f4a0661/7364febf/2825404289/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQzMGFtIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ%3D%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200430am?refcode=kme200430am_m_other&refcode2=17426")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: AOC's Worst Nightmare
body:
I am guessing you’ve heard of Brooklyn Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez but just in case, let me refresh your memory. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ac80da2704ac/crist-is-a-rubber-stamp-1481965?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=0e02f9f5bb&e=bbeef49760 "Donate!")
---
| | Dear Friend, I am guessing you’ve heard of Brooklyn Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez but just in case, let me refresh your memory on the Democrats' darling...
1. She claimed Israel was “occupying” Palestine
2. She is a self-described “socialist” and supports Bernie Sanders’ “Medicare for All” government takeover of healthcare
3. She compared climate change to World War II
4. She celebrated recent energy industry job losses across the country

This is a Member of Congress... one expressing happiness that Americans are losing their jobs! Ridiculous!

When I get to Washington, I will be the anti-AOC! I am a conservative who will defend the Constitution, support our American industry, and champion free-market capitalism. Our country has brought prosperity and freedom to people across the globe and we’re just getting started!

With the end of the month approaching, I have set a goal of raising $10,000 but our campaign is still $2,500 short of that goal. If you can, please contribute to our goal here and help us today >>> **[www.amandamakki.com/donate](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=ab04436bc0&e=bbeef49760)**

My opponent, Charlie Crist, has cozied up to socialists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez who are more supportive of foreign dictators than our own President.

Thanks for your support,
---
|

Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District

For Online Contributions: www.amandamakki.com
For Contributions via Mail, please send to:
Amanda Makki for Congress
PO Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743
---
| |
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/about?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=e545279827&e=bbeef49760&c=02222d0ce5) [unsubscribe from this list](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=e545279827&e=bbeef49760&c=02222d0ce5) [update subscription preferences](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=e545279827&e=bbeef49760)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b19f/18e32a7f/4f95e45e/7b21f146/327910661/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b19f/18e32a7f/4f95e45e/7b21f147/327910661/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b19f/18e32a7f/4f95e45e/7b21f144/327910661/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b19f/18e32a7f/4f95e45e/7b21f140/327910661/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b19f/18e32a7f/4f95e45e/7b21f145/327910661/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Katie Porter
subject: Elizabeth is a fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Warren Democrats is laser-focused on supporting campaigns like mine so Democrats can win big in 2020, take back control in Washington, and lead our country out of this crisis. But just like during her | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f37/3764202781/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I've known Elizabeth for over 20 years -- as her law student, as a researcher working alongside her to study why so many families were going bankrupt, and now as a colleague in Congress holding the Trump administration accountable and fighting for working people.

Here's what I know: **Elizabeth 's a fighter.** Right now, she's leading the charge to put working people front and center as we recover from the coronavirus crisis and rebuild our country.

But she doesn't stop there. She is also fighting for progressive candidates in close races all across the country. I know because in 2018, I was one of them -- and Elizabeth was there every step of the way to help my campaign flip my district blue for the first time in over 30 years.

And this November's election is no different -- because Elizabeth knows that our best shot at leveling the playing field for working families is by winning the White House, taking back the Senate, protecting the House majority, and winning in state legislatures across the country in November.

That's a big part of why she created Warren Democrats: to support progressive candidates in close races this year. They have already endorsed twenty progressive candidates, including me -- and Elizabeth's support has already made a powerful difference for our campaigns.

**Tonight is a big fundraising deadline for Warren Democrats -- and how much they raise will determine the investments they can make in the weeks and months ahead.

[If you are in a place to donate, can you chip in $2 or whatever you can before tonight's fundraising deadline to help power Elizabeth and Warren Democrats?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f36/3764202781/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEzMUZfRU9NX0JTQ19TXzIwMjAwNDMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ31F_EOM_BSC_S_20200430_V1S2_P")**

I know first-hand how important close races are in determining majorities in Congress: In 2018, I challenged a Republican and won one of the closest races of the election -- and helped put Democrats in control of the House.

Warren Democrats is laser-focused on supporting campaigns like mine so Democrats can win big in 2020, take back control in Washington, and lead our country out of this crisis.

But just like during her presidential campaign, Elizabeth doesn't host closed-door fundraisers or spend time cozying up to millionaires, billionaires, or corporate executives for donations. Warren Democrats is powered by grassroots donors like you.

[**That 's why tonight's fundraising deadline is so important. If you are in a place to contribute, can you chip in before midnight to help Warren Democrats reach their goal and make critical investments in the weeks and months ahead?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f36/3764202781/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEzMUZfRU9NX0JTQ19TXzIwMjAwNDMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ31F_EOM_BSC_S_20200430_V1S2_P")

Thanks,

Katie

Congresswoman Katie Porter (CA-45)
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f36/3764202781/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEzMUZfRU9NX0JTQ19TXzIwMjAwNDMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ31F_EOM_BSC_S_20200430_V1S2_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f2d/3764202781/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f2c/3764202781/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f2f/3764202781/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f2e/3764202781/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f11/3764202781/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525707/45c30650/1ca061879/66e93f10/3764202781/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: Richards wins debate!
body:
There was a clear authentic leader at the Debate. It was Bret Richards.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489

https://youtu.be/TnDm0LUkHe0?t=1&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
The first debate is finished (https://youtu.be/TnDm0LUkHe0?t=1&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489) .

We have committed to two more debates.

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
Hello

We won - you, me the guy down the road, and every single Iowan. Your voices have been heard at over 30 county fairs, 250 campaign events and countless calls, emails and facebook chats. I listen to Iowans, remain faithful to my principles, and like you I work hard at everything I do. That is why we won the debate.

Thank you to the Crawford County GOP, Crawford County Republican Women and KDSN for hosting the debate on Sunday April, 26th.

Please share the debate with others your friends so they can see for themselves.
Share it on Facebook by clicking here (https://www.facebook.com/dialog/share?app_id=87741124305&href=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DTnDm0LUkHe0%26feature%3Dshare&display=popup&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
Next thing we really need you to do, is vote.
Fill out an absentee ballot request from by clicking here (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/electioninfo/absenteeinfo.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489) .
Please do it TODAY, fill it out for #TeamBret, and send it back to your County Auditor.
ABSENTEE BALLOT REQUEST (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/electioninfo/absenteeinfo.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
TELL FIVE FRIENDS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
EMAIL ME A QUESTION (mailto:bret@RichardsForCongress.com?subject=Keeping%20in%20touch)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Even during these times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. We need you to keep telling more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home.
Debate night fun

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-we-can-take-comfort-in-temporary-safety-but-our-god-given-liberties-must-remain-eternal/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489

I really enjoyed the debate on Sunday night.

You might have noticed I was standing the whole night. I didn't want to sit, so I stood at a podium in front of the computer.
https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-we-can-take-comfort-in-temporary-safety-but-our-god-given-liberties-must-remain-eternal/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489

Enough debate fun. Back to the reality of campaigning as an underdog. With the help of volunteers many envelopes get addressed and stuffed.

I have always known that hard work is its own reward.

RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-we-can-take-comfort-in-temporary-safety-but-our-god-given-liberties-must-remain-eternal/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489

https://theiowastandard.com/richards-we-can-take-comfort-in-temporary-safety-but-our-god-given-liberties-must-remain-eternal/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489
"At the next possible moment, the legislature needs to reconvene, re-examine these broad emergency powers, and decide which of our rights cannot be infringed...[These questions are] important to have answers to now so we’re not blindsided when the wrong person gets in charge. Because while we can take some comfort in this temporary safety, we know our God-given liberties must remain eternal."
STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)
* and much more... (https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6ycE8yzCF0tZeOk5rwVMemYssZoNXHy&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=1d738d0857-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-1d738d0857-25822489)

clean_body: There was a clear authentic leader at the Debate. It was Bret Richards. The first debate is finished () . We have committed to two more debates. Hello We won - you, me the guy down the road, and every single Iowan. Your voices have been heard at over 30 county fairs, 250 campaign events and countless calls, emails and facebook chats. I listen to Iowans, remain faithful to my principles, and like you I work hard at everything I do. That is why we won the debate. Thank you to the Crawford County GOP, Crawford County Republican Women and KDSN for hosting the debate on Sunday April, 26th. Please share the debate with others your friends so they can see for themselves. Share it on Facebook by clicking here () Next thing we really need you to do, is vote. Fill out an absentee ballot request from by clicking here () . Please do it TODAY, fill it out for #TeamBret, and send it back to your County Auditor. ABSENTEE BALLOT REQUEST () TELL FIVE FRIENDS () LIKE US ON FACEBOOK () PUT UP A SIGN () EMAIL ME A QUESTION (mailto:bret@RichardsForCongress.com?subject=Keeping%20in%20touch) As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you. Even during these times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives. I appreciate your continued support. Your neighbor, p.s. We need you to keep telling more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home. Debate night fun I really enjoyed the debate on Sunday night. You might have noticed I was standing the whole night. I didn't want to sit, so I stood at a podium in front of the computer. Enough debate fun. Back to the reality of campaigning as an underdog. With the help of volunteers many envelopes get addressed and stuffed. I have always known that hard work is its own reward. RECENT COVERAGE "At the next possible moment, the legislature needs to reconvene, re-examine these broad emergency powers, and decide which of our rights cannot be infringed...[These questions are] important to have answers to now so we’re not blindsided when the wrong person gets in charge. Because while we can take some comfort in this temporary safety, we know our God-given liberties must remain eternal." name: Marsha (iPhone)
subject: Fwd: It all comes down to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Please, help us defend the Senate Majority by making a contribution before our Midnight deadline TONIGHT, and remember that we are matching every grassroots contribution 300%!

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42398935&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&spReportId=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2)
****
****
__****
I 'll make this quick.

I hope you saw my note from yesterday - our deadline is in just a few hours and we could use every dollar donated to help defend the Senate Majority.

[**3X DONATE >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Senate Democrat ringleader Chuck Schumer has been working overtime to recruit liberal candidates who have deep pockets, or at least friends with deep pockets. We can't let the Left reverse all of the progress we've made over the last few years under conservative leadership.

Every day that passes is a day closer to the November election, where our Republican Senate Majority is on the line.

Please, help us defend the Senate Majority by [**making a contribution before our Midnight deadline TONIGHT**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0), and remember that we are matching every grassroots contribution 300%!

Marsha

_Sent from my iPhone_

\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---

**To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>**
From: Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
Date: Wednesday, April 29 at 4:46 PM CDT
Re: It all comes down to this
**

-From the Desk of Marsha Blackburn-**

Hi,

I'm writing because Republicans have a critical fundraising deadline tomorrow at Midnight, and we're falling short - _it all comes down to this:_**the Left is reporting unprecedented fundraising hauls, fueled by the liberal special interests and dark money PACs who will spend whatever it takes to remove Senate Republicans and President Trump from office.**

We've seen time and again that not only is the Left unfit to lead, but they're also unrepresentative of the American people.

Instead of creating jobs, they launched a partisan and costly investigation aimed at impeaching the president.

Instead of fighting for tax cuts for all Americans, they incited and encouraged violence against Republicans.

Looking at the Left's track record over the last four years, it is safe to say the election this November will be their most desperate and costly attempt to divide our nation and slander President Trump. _**The Democrats have done nothing but throw fits and tantrums because they 've been unable to accept the outcome of the 2016 election.**_

**Senate Republicans have been hard at work fighting for the American people: securing our borders, confirming strict constitutionalist judges, supporting small businesses, protecting the unborn and putting America FIRST.**

We must stand with President Trump to protect the White House and defend the Republican Senate Majority.

With the month of April coming to an end and Election Day drawing closer, we need your help now more than ever to take on the Left and their coffers. I've authorized 3X matching on all contributions to help Republicans get across the finish line \-- [_**make a contribution today and let 's stand together, united in the fight to keep President Trump in the White House and Republicans in the Senate!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

**[DONATE 3X](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you for your ongoing support and commitment to helping conservatives in 2020. [**I hope I can count on you to step up and make a 3X-matched contribution to help us chip away at the fundraising deficit.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Sincerely,

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Marsha Blackburn
U.S. Senator (R-TN)

__[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzOTg5MzUS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MDAxNDg3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
******** Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and
Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.

Brentwood, TN 37024

name: Steve Chabot
subject: counting down
body:
I emailed you yesterday, but wanted to check back in with you just in case you missed my message.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend, I emailed you yesterday, but wanted to check back in with you just in case you missed my message. Tonight, as the clock strikes midnight and we close out the month of April, we will do one of two things. **OPTION ONE:** We beat our fundraising goal and start the general election in a strong position... sending a loud message to Nancy Pelosi that we're ready for this fight.**OPTION TWO:** We come up short and Pelosi, AOC and the liberal elite see an opportunity to flood the airwaves against us.**I know that I can count on you to make sure the latter doesn 't happen. **[**With the clock winding down on April, I need you to chip in anything you can, as quickly as possible, to make sure we hit our goal.**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-y/) [END OF MONTH FUND](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-j/) [CHIP IN NOW](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-t/) I'm counting on you to stand up for our values, friend. **[Will you stand with me now?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-i/)** Steve Chabot | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhuhhyg-kujkulhluu-k/)

| | Peter,

We were just getting ready to close the books when we got an alert -- **Trump just personally attacked Christy on Twitter and asked his followers to donate to Mike Garcia.**

We're still $7,289 short of meeting our $10,000 match by midnight.

**[There's not a moment to lose. This could tip the scales in this race. Please pitch in -- $5 or whatever you can -- before midnight and double your donation.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb36/29776869/a487e2b/569f79c6/2532098856/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MzBfZW9tVHJ1bXBSUiJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200430_eomTrumpRR")**

Thanks,

Team Christy

name: Steve Chabot
subject: ICYMI: Enquirer Editorial on Small Business Loans
body:
Over the past months I have been working around the clock to help local small businesses and Ohio families weather the storm of the COVID-19 pandemic.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-r/)
# ICYMI: Enquirer Editorial on Small Business Loans
Friend,Over the past months I have been working around the clock to help local small businesses and Ohio families weather the storm of the COVID-19 pandemic. While the economy will begin opening shortly, small businesses still need more help to stay afloat. Below is an op-ed from the Cincinnati Enquirer on the subject of the small business loan program. Please send me your feedback and let me know how I can help!
### **[_Opinion: Small businesses get second chance at Paycheck Protection Program_](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-y/)** , Steve Chabot, April 29, 2020
Since COVID-19 first hit our shores, as the ranking member of the House Small Business Committee, I've heard from thousands of small businesses from all across the country. Locally, I've talked with people who run restaurants, hair salons, and retail shops (just to name a few); dozens of hospitals and health care providers; police, firefighters and other first responders; and state and local government officials.The message has been consistent. Everyone needs help dealing with the unprecedented challenges presented by the coronavirus.Four weeks ago, Congress took significant action, passing the largest economic recovery bill in our nation's history. This critical legislation provided $100 billion to help hospitals and health care providers, $150 billion for state and local governments to deal with virus-related expenses, and $500 billion in loans to help larger businesses forced to shutter their doors due to quarantine orders. The Treasury Department recently began issuing stimulus checks of up to $2,400 (plus $500 per child) to American families, with an estimated 80 million checks delivered in the first week alone.While these efforts are helping Americans survive this incredibly difficult period, perhaps none have been as successful, or as impactful, as the Small Business Administration's Paycheck Protection Program.Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, employing millions of Americans. It's not an overstatement to say that when small businesses succeed, America succeeds.But, right now, many small businesses are struggling. Social distancing and other measures designed to prevent the spread of COVID-19 have forced small business owners to make gut-wrenching decisions to cut hours, lay off employees and even close up shop after years of operation.That's why I've worked closely with Democratic Chairwoman Nydia Velazquez, and our counterparts in the Senate, to craft the bipartisan Paycheck Protection Program. Loans under this program are 100% federally guaranteed, and will help small business owners continue to meet their financial obligations and pay their employees, while they're forced temporarily to suspend operations. To help protect millions of jobs, these loans are forgivable if a business employs the same number of people over the eight-week period covered by the loan, and there's flexibility for businesses to quickly rehire recently laid-off employees. The results have been incredible. In less than two weeks, $350 billion in loans have been approved under the program, providing assistance to more than 1.6 million small businesses. Here in Ohio, more than $14 billion have been approved for nearly 60,000 small businesses. Yet despite these impressive statistics, there are more businesses and more American families who need help. I've heard from dozens of Cincinnati-area companies that weren't able to get loans approved before the initial money ran out. One such company is Mattar Services, Inc., a family-owned commercial electric company, which has provided services here for 33 years. Unfortunately, funding for the program ran out as they were preparing their final loan documentation.That's why we've been working so diligently to replenish the Paycheck Protection Program. By providing more money for this program, we can help companies like Mattar Services remain in business, and continue to pay their employees during these challenging times.Last week, Congress reached an agreement to provide an additional $310 billion in loans, bringing the total to $660 billion, to help provide American families and small businesses some semblance of financial security. The legislation also provided another $75 billion for hospitals, $25 billion for testing and $60 billion for economic disaster loans and grants.So, if you own a small business and you need help, contact your local bank or credit union, and find out how the Paycheck Protection Program can help you maintain your workforce, and continue to make ends meet. But don't wait, because there's no telling for sure just how long these additional funds will last.These are extraordinary times. By taking bold, albeit temporary action today, we can help small businesses survive this crisis, and help American families resume as close to their normal lives as humanly possible. ## | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-j/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-i/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-h/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-k/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jhukutjt-l-u)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jhukutjt-961825B2-kujkulhluu-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jhukutjt-kujkulhluu-b/)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Some of my favorite questions from Rhode Island students
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We are living in unprecedented time, but it's an especially difficult time for our children. They're adapting to distance learning, they're apart from their friends, and they're missing out on the sports and extracurriculars that they love. To help them feel a little more safe, I answered questions from Rhode Island students about our COVID-19 response. I'd like to share with you some of my favorite questions I received.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eCnF7c1zphwg-0i1_3TwHr6ZhydFDJcdbsrOc9P3CuxXbX6vTtPC6_TU1FP6LgZtcdlkrxMtktlFP4ngpKlqaq7IYDiiFIoKgeEsGQWZXS1w0a6z8mG0wBlDg9wqRYPpOQBV69V27CGxrP6XQdcPDSOU2eR8WJag68mQiHWcWJRYhNxTTG7zXi-3d-ii2vS5pzUakoCAw3c=&c=0eVTjRxPk4efYNK_-MhTLsohmCaBGMgylTaeJbPHHv_VibIjeTZa7w==&ch=J0v1blrFlAH7jvAKLW-t9OBjuHXa8gcsf3zju1PWSFmp5VLjULg9OQ==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eCnF7c1zphwg-0i1_3TwHr6ZhydFDJcdbsrOc9P3CuxXbX6vTtPC6_TU1FP6LgZtcdlkrxMtktlFP4ngpKlqaq7IYDiiFIoKgeEsGQWZXS1w0a6z8mG0wBlDg9wqRYPpOQBV69V27CGxrP6XQdcPDSOU2eR8WJag68mQiHWcWJRYhNxTTG7zXi-3d-ii2vS5pzUakoCAw3c=&c=0eVTjRxPk4efYNK_-MhTLsohmCaBGMgylTaeJbPHHv_VibIjeTZa7w==&ch=J0v1blrFlAH7jvAKLW-t9OBjuHXa8gcsf3zju1PWSFmp5VLjULg9OQ==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
|
* When the number of infected people go down, will businesses/parks slowly start to open again? \- Victoria, 5th Grade, Community Prepatory School

Yes, that is our plan! Last week, I introduced the first phase of our reopening plan, which will start to open businesses slowly. I hope we can start to do that very soon. If that goes well and we continue to do important things like wear face coverings, practice social distancing and good hygiene, we will hopefully be able to move to phase two of the reopening plan, open more businesses and increase the size of our gatherings.

* Why can't we safely go back to school? \- Nehemiah, 2nd Grade, Alfred Lima Elementary School

It's still unsafe to go back to school because the virus most easily spreads in large crowds and groups. We are doing a great job of slowing coronavirus down and in order to stop it, we have to keep social distancing and make sure we continue to practice good hygiene like washing our hands regularly.

* What are we gonna do for the class of 2020? \- Gizelle, 12th Grade, Tolman High School

I know this is a tough situation for high school seniors. It's not the senior year you were expecting, and it's not fair. However, we're going to do everything we can to make the rest of your senior year special. For your graduation, we're working on a statewide ceremony that will air on RI PBS on June 15th at 7PM. It's going to feature some exciting guests and you, the class of 2020.

* Can we make signs to cheer people up when they walk by? - Gabriella, 2nd Grade, Hoxsie Elementary

Of course! That's such a thoughtful, creative idea. Cheering people up from a safe distance is a great way to show support to your community. I'd encourage you and all students to think about making a sign to put up in your window. I'd also love to display your artwork from my window at the State House - send it to me and I'll put it up!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eCnF7c1zphwg-0i1_3TwHr6ZhydFDJcdbsrOc9P3CuxXbX6vTtPC6_k-mEvc5Ek5_bHjgkYqqUFBb5-pIcmaXZoT8U5h9CbRE_NSScXVOrxf5IX-kcvMVR9kXcbA9NasURvlqH3623OM3XkCDbL4Mg9eE_u_LCgJ04Iz0o_nBqUOO21U7xpcXGAZgMchnCOSpA2_vPAYzEkfqA7ShnBO-oxKRcpkDp8E&c=0eVTjRxPk4efYNK_-MhTLsohmCaBGMgylTaeJbPHHv_VibIjeTZa7w==&ch=J0v1blrFlAH7jvAKLW-t9OBjuHXa8gcsf3zju1PWSFmp5VLjULg9OQ==)
---
| I know that there are still a lot of questions that kids have, and I'm looking forward to getting to those in the weeks and months to come. I hope to be able to answer more questions from children soon. In the meantime, we're going to go back to our normally scheduled 1 p.m. press conference tomorrow. Please tune in and stay informed.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eCnF7c1zphwg-0i1_3TwHr6ZhydFDJcdbsrOc9P3CuxXbX6vTtPC6_k-mEvc5Ek5CZMhqvEGYM586eNr07g7jWYhcTAXAmV__kCaOnhZjFKB9pBYPN7S-c1TZvjBt7WCFkdnkSyi0Y3XyzZrBxKeOmDGf6IWGq5C7GNaYuWX9CrD4j_gWsElrGyV_Jz8oXXlRsbWx3todOyHWqjHj_D3ywR1KgehpRvJTC1qZfpym7iZ36SO1kYx4RLREHj1s4HUMmwAbcoR71arOASQT9NzEf0QjL9soU_DsLVoKcdvoF-hlI2UKlcb0dgUgj15p96zjPOHthD0rMA=&c=0eVTjRxPk4efYNK_-MhTLsohmCaBGMgylTaeJbPHHv_VibIjeTZa7w==&ch=J0v1blrFlAH7jvAKLW-t9OBjuHXa8gcsf3zju1PWSFmp5VLjULg9OQ==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=9f4d6259-39d0-4942-ba55-4711286b3ca9)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=9f4d6259-39d0-4942-ba55-4711286b3ca9) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
[Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: County Convention Filing Period Begins Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
County & State Conventions Now Online!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17334593/190784525/1098257541?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4ZDkyNy1hZjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAIgPh2Vqy2NwefMVzsYd7iuvZzByjO6lro9Tn6kMjU=&emci=071c634e-6e8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=eea8d927-af8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=5094937)
Fellow Democrat,
It's County Convention time! During this unprecedented time of COVID-19 our first priority is to keep everyone healthy and safe. We can do that and still participate in County and State Conventions even though they will not be in person this year.
You can participate in the County Convention process online by pre-filing to participate and/or run to be a Delegate to the State Convention! You will have from today (May 1) until May 12th at 5 p.m. to pre-file to participate in our online County Convention process!
We know this looks different than in the past and we would like nothing more than to all be together during this exciting time for Democrats, but that's just not in the cards right now. Our Democratic values will still be upheld and everyone who wants to participate in the process will be able to do so!
To participate in the County Convention Process and/or run for Delegate to the Democratic State Convention please follow this link and fill out the pre-filing form!
Please visit [https://wvdemocrats.com/2020countyconventions/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17334594/190784526/1098257541?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4ZDkyNy1hZjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAIgPh2Vqy2NwefMVzsYd7iuvZzByjO6lro9Tn6kMjU=&emci=071c634e-6e8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=eea8d927-af8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=5094937) from May 1st at 9 a.m. to May 12th at 5 p.m. to pre-file to be a Delegate to the State Convention and a participant in the County Convention process.
Please reachout to your Democratic County Chairs if you have any questions or concerns about your County Convention Process! You can find your County Chair on our website here: [https://wvdemocrats.com/county-chairs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17334595/190784527/804265874?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4ZDkyNy1hZjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAIgPh2Vqy2NwefMVzsYd7iuvZzByjO6lro9Tn6kMjU=&emci=071c634e-6e8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=eea8d927-af8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=5094937)
If you need assistance in completing the form or are unable to do so online please call our WVDP Hotline at 681-758-1437.
Thanks!

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/071c634e-6e8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/eea8d927-af8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE4ZDkyNy1hZjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAIgPh2Vqy2NwefMVzsYd7iuvZzByjO6lro9Tn6kMjU=&id=106970630&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

* * *
Peter -- Here are Republican's latest disgusting talking points:
* Trump said he HATED the idea of expanding vote-by-mail because _"you'd never have a Republican elected in this country again."_

* McConnell is pushing Trump's LIE that vote-by-mail increases voter fraud.

Trump and his team of _yes-men_ Republicans are desperately attacking every attempt to expand and protect our right to vote.

[**Peter, this isn't _just_ a pattern by Republicans... this is their PLOT to commit voter suppression!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17337608/190838065/-1001271540?refcode=VC_UD_20200501_EMPET_E1_Kamala-Voting-Rights_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMTZmYTYwLWM0OGItZWExMS04NmU5LTAwMTU1ZDAzYjVkZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OWnHs8JcQEXYMWwxAM6uDPu7H8jfj60xuSqlBZ7PFtg=&emci=7c728b22-688b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6f16fa60-c48b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4584036)

But Democrats have BRAVE and strong leaders in the voting rights fight, like Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, and Stacey Abrams!

Dear supporters, The final days of this election are upon us, with ballots already starting to arrive in mailboxes. Our campaign is working overtime to contact as many voters as possible by phone, text, email, and social media. Just today I talked with a grandmother in Albany who told me that she is a lifelong Republican, but is fed up with Trump and has just changed her registration to Democrat. I said, "Welcome, we're so glad to have you." She called because she was reading her voters pamphlet and wanted to let me know that she would be supporting me, as her first ever Democratic choice. I also got a call from Wilma, a lifelong Democrat, who read my op-ed in the RG this morning and wanted to get her yard sign because she "is always going to support the more progressive one in the race." Our volunteers have been texting with tens of thousands of voters, having exchanges like these:

[**Guest View: The Register Guard**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_QA/ni0YAA/t.31e/Fhnm7iieReC8w9ZNnP0YLQ/h10/FU8BtLA4domMMhy89WHuQHoVhTubTI9VPeEB5YITgvQBPqiZKhwUrY70tDqV3owmlT9Ve78fCDr-2FIdsITYcbVzwMIe7PSfQv6p-2BVMVUZOK8UN95OUTy12Nr-2BemV5kuHX26hV56HKlcSl-2BDQjcH1ilalmpdTIwTybNJAzB1l5k8uUTZeM-2Bt-2BX3EQnCTldtT9r7mM9DDlnAjUPvNxExmkwhyC4RedmT-2BuIkcoJbb03jtRSvfdjzzbeN2mxGA38lt7ctHx7m0YvafhHjvDsNS7xGHXsUqz7h1x0ihL56adpSjlBVQ-2BXOdUyg7EQE1wauwfe-2BEa-2BehdOwJWIgelpNNmQxi8AFIpgWddhFe9IQA8tJUIPvi4sRj7AqOKwed-2FaM-2F20YY14qdgCf0oBCoFVjig47RCJu-2BLMqiXyE5fqlhedfMdjXFKQd-2F7BhfzgrRGUTc7-2BvlShmrKomLiuU4yjp8CQiFHmnCpAa5vBFp9asMEoNFCnlmR8WRyWdUM90IaIvoR4/VD7H) _**It's time for a debate. By Doyle Canning.**_ "Last January I was marching south on Coburg Road in honor of Dr. Martin Luther King, hand in hand with my then five-year-old daughter. The theme was climate justice, so I asked Rep. Peter DeFazio about his statement that transitioning off of fossil fuels by 2030 was "impossible." To my disbelief, he doubled down. When I pressed on what action he would take, he proposed "fixing our traffic lights." His response was terrifyingly out of touch with the scope of the climate crisis. As I squeezed my daughter's hand in mine, I knew that I would run for Congress, because our kids need a champion. Now. We are days from the Democratic primary and it is time for DeFazio to answer the call for a debate on the issues that matter most to voters: housing, healthcare, climate, COVID-19 recovery and more. My campaign has the most volunteers, the most local endorsements from grassroots organizations and is energizing voters to ensure victory in the general election. I am the first viable challenger in 33 years, and the first woman ever to run in the Democratic primary for Congress. I am the first to call out DeFazio's corporate donations from the fossil fuel, timber, health insurance, aviation, weapons and big pharma industries. DeFazio's response to my insurgent challenge has been to punch down and pretend like our positions on the issues are the same. They're not... [**Eugene Weekly: DeFazio's Seniority Won't Save Us**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_QA/ni0YAA/t.31e/Fhnm7iieReC8w9ZNnP0YLQ/h13/OmY440Ww7Qa4Mqv1BPDiKNkN4uy-2FvyqSLGFi-2FESarE-2FzXP4-2F3DJA4lN1kWdZn5qmD66j3vC9S9VKPDqbojHCCPWllTF6GdceTyNK4fM9i4Izxo4qxpc58RQeGm5hFpC1tZwEqtZKCHBG5gRbBvm6p5DshF05zoQli5ngtokRs-2BbfotS-2BTo3qZ3UuT-2FHEI6RI3lMdEyYi-2BrYYaZ8X01A4sreoykVkiDrsokVv64vkxTFE2przLXTQ4gZOgvRsAqWeLRjWRAYGDY7to3Pk0MRWUIn6xjs9QR-2Fy9SHGnEo-2FalhXiaiBSg0VaD3t1nGPOwlJbczUKk0PN-2FhV3OhnJrC4DQ6hc3k0X-2BO8KKxfyXwCo3LLvYVIR-2FJ0w5EYoZIOtq50/dm8r) **_Letters To the __Editor, Election Edition!_** "Last week, _Register-Guard _editors printed a puzzling endorsement for the upcoming primary between Doyle Canning and Rep. Peter DeFazio. They correctly point out that Canning is passionate about climate change, immigration and health care and that DeFazio is not. They endorsed DeFazio anyway, citing his seniority and calling Canning an untested newcomer. In their argument, they admit that DeFazio is moderate by Oregon standards but progressive nationally. Their proof is that he was a cosponsor of the Green New Deal. Do they not know the GND was championed by a freshman representative, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, an untested newcomer who unseated the fourth-most powerful-Democrat in the House? What good is seniority from moderate Democrats when they will leave it to freshmen progressives to do the actual leading anyway? On the very same day that the _RG_ printed this dopey endorsement, 30 representatives signed a letter to FERC requesting a moratorium on approval and construction of oil and gas pipelines such as the Jordan Cove Project. The letter was penned by another untested newcomer, Ilhan Omar, and signed by all four freshmen representatives known as "The Squad." DeFazio did not sign. Right now, tens of millions of Americans are losing their jobs in a system where healthcare is tied to employment and leading polluters are taking advantage of relaxed regulations to shove pipelines down our throats. Despite what out of touch editors tell us, we need representatives that are passionate about health care and climate change, now more than ever. _Colin Moran_ _Eugene_."

We are out of work, without healthcare, struggling to afford to keep a roof over our head and food on the table in the midst of this crisis," she said. "Meanwhile the salmon keep dying, a foreign fossil fuel company endangers us all by trying to build the Jordan Cove Pipeline in our backyards, while timber companies replace workers with machines and make profit for their Wall street backers while leaving our landscapes scarred, sucking our water dry and leaving us with added wildfire risk," she said. She wants to invest in a climate plan putting out-of-work loggers back to work in regenerative forestry, and create manufacturing jobs by turning he coast into a hub for developing offshore wind energy."

clean_body: Our volunteers have been texting with tens of thousands of voters, having exchanges like these: | | | | BALLOTS HAVE ARRIVED IN BENTON COUNTY! COMING SOON TO YOUR MAILBOX. Reply to this email with a selfie when you get yours and we will post with the hashtag #TakeaStand | Dear supporters, The final days of this election are upon us, with ballots already starting to arrive in mailboxes. Our campaign is working overtime to contact as many voters as possible by phone, text, email, and social media. Just today I talked with a grandmother in Albany who told me that she is a lifelong Republican, but is fed up with Trump and has just changed her registration to Democrat. I said, "Welcome, we're so glad to have you." She called because she was reading her voters pamphlet and wanted to let me know that she would be supporting me, as her first ever Democratic choice. I also got a call from Wilma, a lifelong Democrat, who read my op-ed in the RG this morning and wanted to get her yard sign because she "is always going to support the more progressive one in the race." Our volunteers have been texting with tens of thousands of voters, having exchanges like these: | | We need your support now to keep these conversations going! If you can't make calls with us this weekend, . We are spending money fast on yard signs, texting, power dialer software, digital ads and more, and we are $2,370 short of our goal for this week. . Thank you for your support and for being part of this movement. We can do this. Stay well, and stay in the fight! Doyle ?linkid=9&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-oregonizer-yard-signs-have-arrived-get-yours&emailreferrer=email790105_from1066643&emailsubject=the-oregonizer-ballots-are-here-help-doyle-win | | is up and running, touching thousands of voters online every day. Share this hopeful message with your friends and family on , , or . IN THE NEWS... | It's time for a debate. By Doyle Canning. "Last January I was marching south on Coburg Road in honor of Dr. Martin Luther King, hand in hand with my then five-year-old daughter. The theme was climate justice, so I asked Rep. Peter DeFazio about his statement that transitioning off of fossil fuels by 2030 was "impossible." To my disbelief, he doubled down. When I pressed on what action he would take, he proposed "fixing our traffic lights." His response was terrifyingly out of touch with the scope of the climate crisis. As I squeezed my daughter's hand in mine, I knew that I would run for Congress, because our kids need a champion. Now. We are days from the Democratic primary and it is time for DeFazio to answer the call for a debate on the issues that matter most to voters: housing, healthcare, climate, COVID-19 recovery and more. My campaign has the most volunteers, the most local endorsements from grassroots organizations and is energizing voters to ensure victory in the general election. I am the first viable challenger in 33 years, and the first woman ever to run in the Democratic primary for Congress. I am the first to call out DeFazio's corporate donations from the fossil fuel, timber, health insurance, aviation, weapons and big pharma industries. DeFazio's response to my insurgent challenge has been to punch down and pretend like our positions on the issues are the same. They're not... A Union Guide to Oregon's May 19 Primary Election "Doyle Canning is a community organizer and environmental law grad who opposes the Jordan Cove pipeline terminal project and corporate influence in politics." Letters To the Editor, Election Edition! "Last week, Register-Guard editors printed a puzzling endorsement for the upcoming primary between Doyle Canning and Rep. Peter DeFazio. They correctly point out that Canning is passionate about climate change, immigration and health care and that DeFazio is not. They endorsed DeFazio anyway, citing his seniority and calling Canning an untested newcomer. In their argument, they admit that DeFazio is moderate by Oregon standards but progressive nationally. Their proof is that he was a cosponsor of the Green New Deal. Do they not know the GND was championed by a freshman representative, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, an untested newcomer who unseated the fourth-most powerful-Democrat in the House? What good is seniority from moderate Democrats when they will leave it to freshmen progressives to do the actual leading anyway? On the very same day that the RG printed this dopey endorsement, 30 representatives signed a letter to FERC requesting a moratorium on approval and construction of oil and gas pipelines such as the Jordan Cove Project. The letter was penned by another untested newcomer, Ilhan Omar, and signed by all four freshmen representatives known as "The Squad." DeFazio did not sign. Right now, tens of millions of Americans are losing their jobs in a system where healthcare is tied to employment and leading polluters are taking advantage of relaxed regulations to shove pipelines down our throats. Despite what out of touch editors tell us, we need representatives that are passionate about health care and climate change, now more than ever. Colin Moran Eugene." LWV To Hold District 4 Candidate Video Interviews "Each of the candidates for Congressional District 4 (U.S. House of Representatives) will be invited to respond to a set of interview questions from the public using a virtual video interview process. The LWV video interviews will be recorded and then posted for viewing on the websites of the League of Women Voters of Coos County, The League of Women Voters of Oregon, Vote411, and Coos Media. Candidates running for office in the Democratic primary are Doyle Canning and incumbent U.S. Rep. Peter DeFazio." Two Republicans, Two Democrats Square of in Congressional District 4 Primary "We need new leadership in Washington now to fight for national changes that benefit us, not big corporations. We are out of work, without healthcare, struggling to afford to keep a roof over our head and food on the table in the midst of this crisis," she said. "Meanwhile the salmon keep dying, a foreign fossil fuel company endangers us all by trying to build the Jordan Cove Pipeline in our backyards, while timber companies replace workers with machines and make profit for their Wall street backers while leaving our landscapes scarred, sucking our water dry and leaving us with added wildfire risk," she said. She wants to invest in a climate plan putting out-of-work loggers back to work in regenerative forestry, and create manufacturing jobs by turning he coast into a hub for developing offshore wind energy." | ANNOUNCEMENTS... | GAME OF PHONES ATTENTION ALL CANNING FOR CONGRESS VOLUNTEERS! name: Mike Siegel
subject: Let's stand up for workers!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17339561/190865319/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2RkZjNhYy1jZDhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GZtrU3L6L4TE04JR5Wdtiv27k2EdkT6o0MMDq26wzY=&emci=39ddf3ac-cd8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=3cddf3ac-cd8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, **Today is International Workers’ Day, also known as May Day.**

Celebrated as a holiday in many countries around the world, May 1st has long been an important moment to honor workers and build movements for social change. Back in 1884, for example, the American Federation of Labor started the movement for an eight-hour work week on May Day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17339562/190865320/203122784?refcode=em050120&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2RkZjNhYy1jZDhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GZtrU3L6L4TE04JR5Wdtiv27k2EdkT6o0MMDq26wzY=)
**In this moment of crisis today, we must again put workers first.** As farm workers and grocery workers and delivery workers each day work to guarantee our food security, we demand a living wage. As building and construction workers are called back to the job—often without personal protective equipment and social distancing—we demand enforcement of safe working conditions. As nurses and health care workers and emergency medical technicians risk their lives each day in an overburdened and under-resourced private healthcare system, we demand universal, comprehensive Medicare for All. As retired teachers and countless senior citizens struggle to pay the bills and afford prescription medicine, we demand a retirement with dignity. The COVID-19 pandemic has brought the conditions of workers to the forefront. Many of us have newfound appreciation for how interconnected we are as a community. **As we thank workers this May Day, let’s also commit fighting for every worker in the days to come.** In solidarity,
Mike Siegel

As retired teachers and countless senior citizens struggle to pay the bills and afford prescription medicine, we demand a retirement with dignity. The COVID-19 pandemic has brought the conditions of workers to the forefront. Many of us have newfound appreciation for how interconnected we are as a community. As we thank workers this May Day, let’s also commit fighting for every worker in the days to come. In solidarity, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

subject: I wish I had better news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
I wish I had better news to share, but we missed our end-of-month fundraising goal yesterday — not by a lot, but enough to make a difference in this incredibly competitive race. Now look, I’m not in a panic. I understand how difficult this time is for folks, and it makes sense our numbers have dipped. My top priority is ensuring you and your loved ones are safe. **But this does put our campaign at risk.** Mitch McConnell and his billionaire friends have their eyes on us. They’re planning to dump millions and millions of dollars into our race to keep their grip on control and stop us from getting Washington to work for all Coloradans. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:

| | Friend, we're in trouble: Our opponent is flooding this race with $20 million of her personal fortune, a GOP super PAC is at our backs - and this week, we fell short of our critical match goal. **This could ruin our chance to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.**
---
But here's the good news: **Those generous donors just agreed to EXTEND the match! They'll double every dollar, up to $10,000, until tomorrow at _midnight_ - so we're counting on you to take advantage before time runs out.**
If you care about winning in Georgia and retaking the Senate majority, please don't let us fall short again, friend. **Click this link to donate now and make sure your gift is matched: **
**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/warnock-match-2x](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e716/288179be/a5d0471/348e93a4/782003092/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkyLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk192-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Alex Raposo
Deputy Campaign Manager
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Reverend Warnock (personal)

Subject: hours left
| | |

I'll be honest, friend: I need your help.
We're only a few hours away from the first official FEC deadline of the month, and I just got some bad news from my team:** If donations don't pick up right away, we're on track to fall short of our match goal. **
Make no mistake: Control of the U.S. Senate is on the line in this race. With my Republican opponent spending millions of her personal fortune to buy this seat and strengthen Mitch McConnell's grip on power, **the _only_ way we'll be able to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate is if grassroots folks like you pitch in - but time is almost up for you to have your gift matched. **
**Friend, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: ****[Will you please give $5 or more right now- every dollar will be doubled - to have your donation go twice as far to make up this shortfall, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e716/288179be/a5d0471/348e93a4/782003092/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkyLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk192-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
This is the biggest test we've faced so far. And if we fail, we'll lose the best chance we've got at ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all.
That's why this match offer is so important. To flip Georgia blue and fight back against every last right-wing attack, we need to close this fundraising gap by midnight tonight - and this match is the way we do it.
**I'm counting on you to chip in right now, ****friend: [Please, if you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, will you give $5 or more - before our critical match opportunity expires - to help us hit our end-of-month goal and flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e716/288179be/a5d0471/348e93a4/782003092/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkyLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk192-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for standing alongside me in this fight.

Reverend Warnock

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: A successful April
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Our campaign made great strides over the last month, and it wouldn't have happened without YOU! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1da33e48eb29/a-successful-april?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| _I hope that you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this time. If you need help accessing any resources during this pandemic, click[here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c2902bf193&e=140a9b81e7) for resources within the state of Illinois. We will get through this together_
---
| |
#
I wanted to make sure that all of my friends and supporters received an update on the campaign following a successful April! Our campaign has been moving along, adapting to the new challenges presented by the COVID-19 pandemic. Here is a recap of what we have been up to!
* Our terrific team of volunteers has made over 10,000 phone calls to voters in the 16th district. In this time of social distancing, phonebanking is the best way for us to reach out to voters. If you are interested in helping, reach out to kathy@daniforillinois.com in order to get started!
* Our volunteers have also sent out over 1,200 postcards to voters in the precincts that we know will be key to flipping this seat from red to blue!
* We held our second successful Facebook Live Town Hall with over 600 viewers. You can watch the town hall [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4256f04310&e=140a9b81e7)!
* Yesterday, I was able to hop on the Ben Joravsky show and talk about our campaign as well as how the Trump Administration's response to the COVID-19 pandemic has been dangerous and inadequate. Listen [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=73ba31c493&e=140a9b81e7). Our interview gets started at the 1:09 mark.

As I said, it was a wildly successful month! We wouldn't be able to have this success without you, so thank you from the bottom of my heart. I am incredibly grateful to have your support.

I also wanted to invite you to our virtual meet and greet we will be having via Zoom on Monday, May 4th! I'll be joined by speakers from progressive groups like Planned Parenthood, Indivisible, the National Organization for Women, and Rust Belt Rising to talk about our campaign and why electing Democrats up and down the ballot in the midwest is critical this November. You can grab your tickets to the event [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e353d6ccc3&e=140a9b81e7)!

Thank you again for your support. I am beyond thrilled to have you on my side in this fight.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Major Endorsement - Kansas Farm Bureau
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚩 | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/49a7d3d433a8/its-time-to-run-to-the-fight-6888830?e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| | | Friends,

I am incredibly humbled and honored to announce that this morning the _**Kansas Farm Bureau**_ endorsed me for Congress as their candidate in the 2nd congressional district.

Kansas farmers have spoken. _**Their endorsement of our campaign shows that Kansans are ready for new representation in Washington D.C.**_ They want a candidate who represents their values and can keep this seat in Republican hands.

For nearly 100 years, the Kansas Farm Bureau has been the premier advocacy organization for the agriculture community in our state. As a lifelong Kansan, I know the vital role that agriculture has played in our past and will play in our future and am proud to work with ag leaders to ensure that the needs of our farmers and producers will be heard in Washington D.C.

The Kansas agriculture community can be confident that I will be a fierce advocate for them as I fight for less regulation, improvements to our rural infrastructure, more markets, and fairer trade.

I am very grateful that the Kansas Farm Bureau has recognized my commitment to our agriculture community and I am pleased to have their endorsement in the 2nd congressional district race.

Nancy Pelosi knows this is a critical seat for her to retain control of the House, which is why it is being targeted heavily by national liberal groups.[ _**I could really use your support to ensure that we win this primary and keep Kansas red in November.**_](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b4f80fa8d9&e=1050d051da) I sincerely appreciate any amount you could donate to my campaign for U.S. Congress. Thank you for your continued support!
---
| Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner
---

clean_body: 🚩 | | | | | | | | Friends, I am incredibly humbled and honored to announce that this morning the Kansas Farm Bureau endorsed me for Congress as their candidate in the 2nd congressional district. Kansas farmers have spoken. Their endorsement of our campaign shows that Kansans are ready for new representation in Washington D.C. They want a candidate who represents their values and can keep this seat in Republican hands. For nearly 100 years, the Kansas Farm Bureau has been the premier advocacy organization for the agriculture community in our state. As a lifelong Kansan, I know the vital role that agriculture has played in our past and will play in our future and am proud to work with ag leaders to ensure that the needs of our farmers and producers will be heard in Washington D.C. The Kansas agriculture community can be confident that I will be a fierce advocate for them as I fight for less regulation, improvements to our rural infrastructure, more markets, and fairer trade. I am very grateful that the Kansas Farm Bureau has recognized my commitment to our agriculture community and I am pleased to have their endorsement in the 2nd congressional district race. Nancy Pelosi knows this is a critical seat for her to retain control of the House, which is why it is being targeted heavily by national liberal groups. I sincerely appreciate any amount you could donate to my campaign for U.S. Congress. Thank you for your continued support! | Yours in the fight, Jake LaTurner | "Send a Conservative Fighter to Congress!" | | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved.

name: Rita Hart
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lMhHueLEAeBczjfm9Yx7X6cAkbpgd2pa82YJLAfHb2U=/vU-kBRYaBos9aybd1AHnctevYp8js6e2wq3ovbZxNyo=) Peter, I can't thank you enough for your incredible outpouring of support during one of the most challenging times in recent history. I truly want to thank you for what you've helped us achieve over the last month. I am so honored to have a team that can be strong while looking out for others during a time of crisis. Our community is proving that we're resilient and we do what needs to be done and get through things together. I am extending my sincere gratitude to health care professionals, essential workers, teachers and volunteers who made and donated PPE. The countless gifts of kindness and acts of dedication should not be forgotten or unrecognized. We know we are going to be fighting this health crisis for a while longer, and there's still more work ahead as we count down to Election Day, but I know we will get through this successfully together. Thank you for everything you've done this past month and continue to do. \-- Rita Hart [FOLLOW ME ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/lMhHueLEAeBczjfm9Yx7X6cAkbpgd2pa82YJLAfHb2U=/CXa7wKVB6a9V0pFfeVcjW_citUdpSNGvRaq7t_lLEFU=) [FOLLOW ME ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/lMhHueLEAeBczjfm9Yx7X6cAkbpgd2pa82YJLAfHb2U=/LOTNQXSwB6b_Rhu49_YkC2TQQC2Fq3ESBENBkkAvEOM=?lang=en) | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17340790/190890214/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJiZGNhOS1kNzhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTMnbI9JYdsn6JIN72NPFvd5pbN__nj_8Ox4sTrURjE=&emci=50b575b4-d883-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=4ebbdca9-d78b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friend --

You’ve been an incredible supporter of my campaign, so I wanted you to be the first to know that we have formed a **National Finance Committee** tasked with helping our campaign raise the resources we need to win in CA-53. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17340791/190890215/1147193815?refcode=em-200501-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJiZGNhOS1kNzhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTMnbI9JYdsn6JIN72NPFvd5pbN__nj_8Ox4sTrURjE=)
**Some of our leading co-chairs include State Senate President Toni Atkins, former San Francisco Mayor Willie Brown, and former State Senator Chris Kehoe.**

As you’ve probably guessed, fundraising has been especially difficult lately. That problem is only compounded by the fact that our opponent is self-funding a significant portion of her campaign (82%).

We have a tall task ahead of us, but I’m humbled that these leaders, and many others, are coming together and digging deep to help us run a well-funded, winning campaign.

**Of course, your continued support is going to be instrumental in our efforts too, friend.** Money is not everything -- but it will matter in our race. And every dollar we raise increases our ability to share my progressive message far and wide.

**[To help us build momentum, I’m humbly asking if you can add a contribution of $3 to help us pick up our fundraising pace. Believe me when I say that every single donation will make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17340792/190890216/1147193815?refcode=em-200501-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWJiZGNhOS1kNzhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTMnbI9JYdsn6JIN72NPFvd5pbN__nj_8Ox4sTrURjE=)**

Thank you — from the bottom of my heart.

_Georgette Gómez_ **[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200501-all-a)**

name: Dr. Woody Myers
subject: Our state’s future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Myers for Governor PO Box 1903
body:
I'm running for Governor of Indiana because Hoosiers deserve access to affordable health care, a high-quality public education, and good-paying jobs. Together, we can make this vision a reality with new leadership where people are first -- not politics. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17340817/190891299/-933748730?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWFhZTYxMS1kODhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBwLns7Uj1vvkRHmRNTkuGhlKJ2SMN9w00b_j6g4OU8=)
