| You're receiving this email because of your past support for Democrats. Dr. Woody Myers is a physician and educator who's running for Governor of Indiana because we need leaders who will put people before politics. Dr. Myers is relying on grassroots supporters like you to help him fight for our future, and email is an important way to organize and keep in touch. But if you'd like, you can [unsubscribe at any time](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5d3e09ba-d328-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68/a5aae611-d88b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWFhZTYxMS1kODhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBwLns7Uj1vvkRHmRNTkuGhlKJ2SMN9w00b_j6g4OU8=&id=123192508&emailAddress=DPWILLIS67%40GMAIL.COM).
* * *
Peter,

I'm running for Governor of Indiana because Hoosiers deserve access to affordable health care, a high-quality public education, and good-paying jobs.

Together, we can make this vision a reality with new leadership where **people are first -- not politics.** In these unprecedented times, it is now more crucial than ever that we hear from grassroots supporters like you:

**_[Can you take a moment out of your day to tell us what issues are most important to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17340818/190891300/66955843?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWFhZTYxMS1kODhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBwLns7Uj1vvkRHmRNTkuGhlKJ2SMN9w00b_j6g4OU8=&emci=5d3e09ba-d328-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=a5aae611-d88b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=17630224)_**

I will work hard for every Hoosier to get ahead because too many people are struggling to make ends meet and to keep up with the increasing cost of living.

As governor, I’ll use my background in health care and business to guarantee all Hoosiers can access high-quality health care at an affordable cost, bring more good-paying jobs to Indiana and provide every Hoosier child with a world-class public education.

_**[What issues are most important to you? Our digital tools are an increasingly important way to keep in touch: Please take our quick online survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17340819/190891301/-152359400?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWFhZTYxMS1kODhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBwLns7Uj1vvkRHmRNTkuGhlKJ2SMN9w00b_j6g4OU8=&emci=5d3e09ba-d328-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=a5aae611-d88b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=17630224)**_

I served our state under two Governors, Republican Governor Robert Orr and then-Democratic Governor Evan Bayh, as Indiana's youngest State Health Commissioner.

I know what it takes to lead Indiana, especially during a public health crisis. I look forward to hearing about the issues that matter to you and earning your vote!

Thank You!

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17340820/190891302/-906111173?refcode=2020_JDWelcomeSeries_S_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWFhZTYxMS1kODhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBwLns7Uj1vvkRHmRNTkuGhlKJ2SMN9w00b_j6g4OU8=)

As governor, I’ll use my background in health care and business to guarantee all Hoosiers can access high-quality health care at an affordable cost, bring more good-paying jobs to Indiana and provide every Hoosier child with a world-class public education. I served our state under two Governors, Republican Governor Robert Orr and then-Democratic Governor Evan Bayh, as Indiana's youngest State Health Commissioner. I know what it takes to lead Indiana, especially during a public health crisis. I look forward to hearing about the issues that matter to you and earning your vote! Thank You! = Dr. Woody Myers | | | = = Paid for by Myers for Governor PO Box 1903 Indianapolis, IN 46206 United States This message was sent to your email address Dr. Woody Myers is running to be Governor of Indiana because he knows our state needs new leadership where people are first - not politics. As Governor, Woody will use his background in business and in medicine to guarantee all Hoosiers can access high-quality health care at an affordable cost, bring more good-paying jobs that can’t be shipped overseas to Indiana and provide every Hoosier child with a world-class public education. Woody is running a grassroots campaign, which means our success is fueled by supporters like you. = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Find out your Hoosier primary voting options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Elections are still moving forward during the coronavirus pandemic, and absentee voting is now an option for all registered voters. Find out more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/we-still-need-you-469201?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9ccfc50480&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-17-16:51:42:739t
---
| Hoosier Republican

Did you hear the news?

Indiana has made some important changes to allow all Hoosiers to safely vote in this primary election as we battle the spread of COVID-19.

First, our state primary has been moved from May 5th to June 2nd. Second, for this primary Hoosiers can choose the voting method that’s best for their situation — absentee vote by mail, early voting, or voting on Primary Day.

To get started, we need to make sure you and your fellow Republicans’ voter registration is up to date. **Be sure to register or update your registration online at**[**indianavoters.in.gov**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fdd33e6505&e=1acd9bb3d6)**by the May 4 deadline.**

To vote early beginning May 26, review your ballot and find your polling place at **[indianavoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=012df4af85&e=1acd9bb3d6).**

If you’d like to work the polls, contact your county Republican Party chairman – find their contact info here: **[http://indiana.gop/counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9336b352ed&e=1acd9bb3d6)**.

Another big change is that now all Hoosiers have the option to vote absentee by mail. If you chose to vote by absentee ballot this primary election, _you must request your ballot by May 21_.

**How to vote absentee by mail in the Indiana primary:**
* Go to **[IndianaVoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=36403e9736&e=1acd9bb3d6)** and click “Vote By Mail or Traveling Board.”
* Click “Visit My Voter Portal,” and securely log in with your name, date of birth and county.
* On the left navigation bar, select “Absentee Voting,” and then click “Vote By Mail.”
* Complete the “Application for Absentee Ballot by Mail Only For 2020 Primary Election” form. Select a Republican ballot.
* Check that you authorize your signature to be added to the application, and then click “Submit Application.”
* You will get your absentee ballot in the mail.
* Fill out the ballot and return it to your county election division.

You can also visit our election update website to stay up to date on election news by clicking here: **[https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=089786420e&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

If you have any questions, call your county election division and they can walk you through the process – no matter which voting option you choose.

Don’t miss this important opportunity to make your voice heard at the ballot box this election cycle!

\- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---

clean_body: I am extremely disappointed. Mitch McConnell, Karl Rove, and I were all ignored when we reached out to warn you about a liberal takeover. Now, Republicans are dangerously behind. This is worse than I imagined. I emailed you. Mitch McConnell. Karl Rove emailed. Newt Gingrich emailed. We all tried to warn you, and we were all ignored. I am extremely disappointed, but I am reaching out ONE FINAL time. 5X MATCHING has been extended 24 hours. == == == == == == == Democrats are just FOUR seats away from stealing the Senate. The Left has invested millions into key battleground states, and ratings are shifting in Democrats' favor! We could face a MAJOR BLOWOUT in November. By ignoring our urgent pleas for help, you've put the Senate Majority in serious jeopardy. You're a dedicated patriot, I am counting on YOU. == Don't let us down. We are running out of time to make up the ground. I need to know if you're with us in this fight before midnight tonight. == Thank you, == Donald Trump Jr. == If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! name: Josh Hicks
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Thank you, friends!

All thanks to supporters like you, we hit our grassroots fundraising goal in April.

Running this race has always been about bringing the voices of everyday Kentuckians to Washington and enacting some real change. In difficult times like these, good leadership is more important than ever. That means putting others’ stories, and needs, ahead of your own — and I’ll never forget that.

Today, I want to say thank you for helping us move one step closer to our goal. Hundreds of you stepped up to help us meet our online fundraising goal — chipping in an average of $29.19 to support an ol’ Fleming County country boy for Congress.

I can’t win this race on my own, but together, we can get the job done.

We couldn’t do this without you, and I am very grateful.

Thank you,

Josh

Chip in >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ky?refcode=HIC_20200501_em_fr_eomty_all_pt

Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.

He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ky?amount=5&refcode=HIC_20200501_em_fr_eomty_all_ptftr]

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ky?refcode=HIC_20200501_em_fr_eomty_all_ptftr2]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c1b64808-c18b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/789af3d1-dd8b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODlhZjNkMS1kZDhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTOaaYPbreCdwxyIfbTIPoapdydWDwfGygg7kpsQo8Y=&id=120613561&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

# _**The next 30 days ****are HUGE for our campaign.**_
Our fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight. Please support our campaign by chipping in $25, 100, 0r even $50 to get a **TRUE TRUMP SUPPORTER** representing your values in D.C.

We are 30 days out from June 2nd and I need all the help I can get. Every dollar you contribute will go a long way to pay for mailers to go out to the 2nd District, to pay for gas and pizza for our volunteers and to fight back against our opponents desperate attempts to run negative ads.

This week was huge. In case you missed it I was endorsed by the founder of the House Freedom Caucus: Jim Jordan of Ohio. But **THE BEST IS YET TO COME!****** We will win this primary and we WILL WIN IN NOVEMBER. [Click here to donate $25, $50, or $100. ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=7c0c7b92aa&e=90fad69796) Thank you and God Bless!
For Iowa,

\- Bobby Schilling

](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/08QTgzv9SHi87PisGOqClg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKf5I9p0Kvq94QNXLaKcogeUPwclWeVP7JwEjPK-2B8nk-2Bx3Bwsphd-2BxyOT6g3F-2BWw6UjU7ImU-2BdmPih58f3BPLvoX04Od07QmlFJRwt4eIO8mdUQUBiIzdic6Pc-2FTp6z1cO-2Bl12eHe8zFTJwNgckzI-2BfP0fd3TzPaPSi4qQFOD-2FJ42kn7EX2T4pr91tfAghDeZ7uBptft-2F7lbfM7plYJV-2FJtdyVpo6F-2FiHhik5pk9L1e76CqTB8fNSZQia1RzRqlN6ZX6KLQRlj1IyPJEHn0vTSyr7sgPuWutVdBVn-2FLpGIDCzLpFt-2Bw44ln8g5Ha1MRbXl2NaOh-2BJjP-2FZvj2WmEJEgzeNADfaBXdwvrlVirptAQiHDDwaM6WyJf-2B98aso0UtXA-3D/1rKN) Friend, **** **** **** Our campaign just picked up yet another huge endorsement! Today, the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC announced its endorsement of Mondaire. Its mission is to elect strong, progressive leaders to Congress and Mondaire is that type of leader.
CPC PAC Co-Chair Rep. Mark Pocan, who has also endorsed Mondaire, said, “Mondaire will be a true champion for working-class families and we’re proud to endorse his candidacy. Especially during this crisis, we need more leaders like Mondaire in Congress who understand first-hand the economic struggles that so many Americans face.”
The CPC PAC is joining Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Ayanna Pressley, Representative David Cicilline, the Working Families Party, and over 40 local elected officials and community leaders in supporting our campaign. **_[Will you make a donation today to join them in supporting Mondaire?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/08QTgzv9SHi87PisGOqClg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKf5I9p0Kvq94QNXLaKcogeUPwclWeVP7JwEjPK-2B8nk-2B4sakrYlj9pXxqDzgcDPt0v0kGh6PKTQc1v7Uvj0hFKSenIrc8R358yHyJP1yMkLAGYOZ9BwndGJ3-2BVN3AtpkbOzvA7gMNb8SJpHPjpqY-2FKf5zAxSWYhoMAiOhtk89q-2F5twsqVSmB34SdG4welXjtxhADdEG7UEO4lBrry4el7jLE3xzdwQeLObd2-2Bo7BuPipdkNW1esWyBLU0zbJ8F-2F03gZkBazAh9K5EIR2E4JUbecoWcqM07XsaUOc-2BzPQ20jSRMh3cuYslLsELcyebI0qyiG4woTSSeXVbY-2FBIczyFdXhQgJTefqA8WGGiIVtRTbizQuQEx7aHlMZVlp4y5v7FM-3D/-3He)_**
Mondaire is the only candidate in the race supporting Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, student debt forgiveness, and universal child care. The CPC PAC knows that, in Congress, Mondaire will fight for the bold policy solutions we need in order to tackle our country’s biggest crises.
Mondaire isn’t accepting money from corporate PACs. In Congress, he’ll always fight for the best interests of his constituents, rather than be beholden to special interests. **_[Can you chip in today to help fuel our people-powered campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/-AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/08QTgzv9SHi87PisGOqClg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKf5I9p0Kvq94QNXLaKcogeUPwclWeVP7JwEjPK-2B8nk-2B2jXTAcuOStKf9YKqxvzldd4JKrc8O8ywsXEJheTZ-2FFLTc36YgsO7fGkidgqPalteorw8lpGu77hxPE99tVITPuT5K-2Bt6-2FBLNbPJwuDhlX9YYjA0KfeAzfbU84SMrhTv80Hi87I7BJu4mpBRu3waC4Ae8zXLOPyVOtbf6I32R3i4NP0mw-2FA4IwvZCKn-2F9MTMOzbs00LEkYbRSKV3-2BBikHqtaZUOmhpLX8Rrb-2B73p5MZmtc-2F0i6BTFkQ0czgXRpuIUxbCw7VtmzL09lna6jlIoW3q0RC1ciqqdI2tJenN2JXQJBdpHbTyQpEjc7yEoBndB3W1NqJylfkuzWqaIDHRREo-3D/5Wxd)_**

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Lots to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We had our strongest quarter yet thanks to this team, but there's still a ton left to do.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ff/7f51f7bc/4fd534ec/4ef160cd/2120452465/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Thanks to this team, we've had our strongest fundraising quarter yet -- **[now let's keep that momentum going!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ff/7f51f7bc/4fd534ec/4ef160cc/2120452465/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200501.1nd__1319__&amount=10")** With an impressive grassroots team of more than 42,000 donors powering our campaign, we're in the best position to win the nomination and take on Sen. Cornyn, but there's still a bunch of work to do.

We have to continue reaching out to our neighbors if we want to send a healthy dose of Texas values to Washington. In our current environment, with in-person events suspended, that means virtual organizing, texting and calling voters, and doing more virtual town halls and events. All of these take resources, so if you can, **[donate to help continue our momentum and come out of this runoff ready to take on Sen. Cornyn!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ff/7f51f7bc/4fd534ec/4ef160cc/2120452465/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200501.1nd__1319__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ff/7f51f7bc/4fd534ec/4ef160cc/2120452465/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200501.1nd__1319__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ff/7f51f7bc/4fd534ec/4ef160c3/2120452465/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1319&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ff/7f51f7bc/4fd534ec/4ef160c2/2120452465/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

Round Rock, TX 78683

This will be your **ALL-ACCESS PASS** to my reelection campaign. I'm only alerting my TOP SUPPORTERS about this exclusive app, so be sure to download it NOW before anyone else.

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Call Trump out on every damn lie
body:
He's banking on us forgetting that he told us to drink bleach | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/HcmRkapMT06cQNlikVkrdg/h0/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUId-2BjWrqqfrUlr5OgQ-2BFTiELT6QYp4m7Wpa-2FEypK86oXiZ2yHJ5A5igv-2FLEbP7dF47N8TbVcmAb1cFaR4-2F8r19gN8wczfF-2B7DEnO27-2BNmpAU1fB1-2FS6niboa9EQq8PFX6t2TlhFM3Is9UzafIZrEOG49Bj7Edy-2FfDuQhbWF0k5of97WR9C1hHmQm3XDfkBVo-2B7tOT6wzH3LaupPNRRrrSIa9SsXoDHh1R8JqEKsOUQq1MqlKZhFYbdPxI-2BxmeTHMB0DjM-2Bh-2FUvZTKhJfCcD9Cy9b/THuO) Don’t drink bleach, even during a pandemic.

If there were ever a perfect example of why we need to fight back against Trump’s lies, that was it. Trump lied. People died.

Unless you haven’t read the news in a week, you know what we’re talking about: Trump’s handling of the pandemic sunk to a new level when he suggested that a good way to combat the coronavirus would be for people to inject themselves with disinfectants. (To be clear, you absolutely should not do this.)

Now, he’s banking on us forgetting that the President of the United States told us to inject disinfectants into our bodies. He wants us to move on to the next news cycle and leave the Lysol references behind.

And he has good reason to believe in that strategy — it’s worked for his entire presidency.

**[Together, we’re going to put an end to that. We’re going to hold Trump accountable by calling out his lies and sharing the truth. Get started right now by sharing this Facebook post that sets the record straight:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/HcmRkapMT06cQNlikVkrdg/h1/DDdEWe5maUJafQE7xr6e3Bi-2FwUflVjuKTtUIkDoLIoV-2BTGxjmoU1MX8slyUgOxQvu8Crr-2BYh6GNKa3QvrSRoNDh5ZZLexWPnJUS0Fo5IVEaflp7EbapJQFsUN4ffOrL8HSSMNyx440uhXsZQD21nrSn7LIUqg-2FXQii2N8HvXotKF-2F6CLRn3zdFotSHgpneOpK6-2F0aUEU-2FNxK19eQHY-2B72CRawHLO7sq9k2pXnJx-2BQyC1J3yAsyA0KEn70G9Ps13arYUv290V7vPKz-2BFbIDmXoivVMynzlbGc-2FCkSW-2BvsW8Mo0RpjZcw0ZwxisG3H3ZRZnV1NwiNxWjE9v-2B6q3BbWpYXT-2FvDxLWElo83XC9oYrxGWdbZd-2Fyt4SyVL6AeTOGEXjiFeZtvsGaNZs2WpI9-2Flvvxy-2F29JIrOqPZebfV7lFk8-3D/qGFN)**

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/HcmRkapMT06cQNlikVkrdg/h2/DDdEWe5maUJafQE7xr6e3Bi-2FwUflVjuKTtUIkDoLIoV-2BTGxjmoU1MX8slyUgOxQvu8Crr-2BYh6GNKa3QvrSRoNDh5ZZLexWPnJUS0Fo5IVEaflp7EbapJQFsUN4ffOrL8Fpu-2BPJtkD1qZD92-2B-2FFtX752g7o7x4j-2F0E4NwNQvAqM8csDpT0wedeNQW1y2bsJUTy0GeirCG0DGxSQmpAEKNL4Q7lkKaveJAC8GP8Zx66rLZksUaPR-2BES9F0uoRxN7hf2j7XP-2FqQXLvDu9w8Xfu5ck8Md1nArd32ZkcCd0ayTncnQuToa2uezB3uixZQq2l3T-2FzciEBAMjkYOmt2aEyX9zl6WVVZlmRciqxt5jyeniXnPnONKT8Ba9WhS4tLpyKgV-2B1MxwXqFjAozCWy1NpT1iN3txYE1xq7Sg7LBPkRKAI-3D/Lfpt) Why this lie and why right now?

We crunched the numbers and the story they tell is clear: People are angry at Trump for telling a lie so dangerous that it’s led to huge spikes in calls to poison control hotlines across the country about drinking, injecting, or gargling bleach.

That means the best way for us to lower Trump’s reelection chances right now is to keep hitting him on his insane comments about bleach. And this Facebook post, from a psychiatrist who knows from professional experience the dangerous effect a president's careless words can have, is the purest version of the message that will take down Trump.

**[Let's make it go viral. Share this post now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/HcmRkapMT06cQNlikVkrdg/h3/DDdEWe5maUJafQE7xr6e3Bi-2FwUflVjuKTtUIkDoLIoV-2BTGxjmoU1MX8slyUgOxQvu8Crr-2BYh6GNKa3QvrSRoNDh5ZZLexWPnJUS0Fo5IVEaflp7EbapJQFsUN4ffOrL8V9ULLnKR9Qa8WOo6YEfoYs1G3axD2DN9gdipVhaP-2FsQvuRkMuBPyt3UQRe74yHblG8-2B7CMNbR8Ki1j6A9zccWABZkrGtPq-2FozD-2BPLg2na8xl7a2JRFWEkQSeNGT4tdzEAf01sJgZ0Fw6sKbzTrNSqTTPYxMawcPdM4shQIJk5j0QpasxTXDOQgmMKmSyCB2FqnaquaR7y8oIz3kOF6s4Xkmkd-2FYLf5NFt92drJkyQ4jacCeB-2B-2BuxK-2BTPY2ifFjUIu8frRvPivxC74KttAvd3Sf8XAYyY-2FpDBw5-2FwylM-2FomY-3D/xQsa)**

Easy, right?

It’s simple, but this is exactly how we hit Trump where it hurts. We call him out on every damn lie.

By the logic that he’s imposed on us, this little lie about drinking bleach and whether or not he even said it is no big deal because within a few days he’ll have distracted us with another big lie. And then the cycle will repeat.

**But here’s the thing: If we keep playing Trump’s game by the rules he sets, we’ll keep losing.**

And we’re not just talking about losing the election. People are dying. And not just because of this one lie. Trump repeatedly downplayed the risks of this pandemic, exaggerated the availability of tests, and promoted unproven and often dangerous treatments.

**[Trump’s lies are no laughing matter and we can’t let them slide any longer. Call Trump out on this lie and every other lie he tells between now and Election Day. Share this post now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/HcmRkapMT06cQNlikVkrdg/h4/DDdEWe5maUJafQE7xr6e3Bi-2FwUflVjuKTtUIkDoLIoV-2BTGxjmoU1MX8slyUgOxQvu8Crr-2BYh6GNKa3QvrSRoNDh5ZZLexWPnJUS0Fo5IVEaflp7EbapJQFsUN4ffOrL8T8DBK8-2BrJsHY8Fy9B4GO3CKpran3sWj5ODM0udWg5O9s9EZJgig4hOfukeOAPAuLfzp9V5zA-2Bsr17Yz1H-2Fhvjz3nR37mYoNrWOY6F7BtgXIzSCMtpKvRlQnEDIgZFfTxyfpR3TtRpFvNqVHN9jRjO1TzLZlRYlzuPhEKx1DG2CcmFx8ngZpk5kM-2Ff6jIUBQqJxSsgL8sXsPqGOX8MYBYE-2Fdof1iyMqirVOMbDj1m1mb8gACkmDWVeh3esXZIbOoICkAAByeGpOsyPWW6Y7LAKdkeHmPZKQXLB9xnwdHXHxQ-3D/CwXZ)**

And keep an eye on your inbox. We’ll have more soon.

The Defeat Disinfo Team
---
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/HcmRkapMT06cQNlikVkrdg/h5/qaTHIawuIhDBoP5R1rxJtid1JnAka5QYgiRZZh3fsiY-3D/evIO). To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defeat Disinfo, please [click here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6AA/ni0YAA/t.31e/HcmRkapMT06cQNlikVkrdg/h6/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZib6U1j4NzzRN1XZbVIcI-2BVF1hXkDIXoKSAx9wF6ho0N32dzxZDc0awQq5twstiw0q6C1SODe3F8vCHmsoNZblf1bmVmIesENMjXo-2Fctp4GdMiPjpqx1eavJrNsXdl4b-2FxIDh8MlJiznUwecjMvDevuIEjxYqfjAhBa9veYFG-2Fwm4iqs6VBCanIX7XHiW58X5RvYTH6tQQlexKxFkQrd8QqE-3D/Iwm0).
---

name: Team Tina
subject: Re: last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
_These are difficult times, so please only donate if you can afford to do so. Just knowing you opened this email in the first place makes us grateful. Thank you._
* * *
Folks, we’ve spent all morning tallying up the numbers after closing the books on our end-of-month fundraising deadline last night, and we have some bad news: **We missed the goal.** Here's why that matters: Minnesota is a must-win state for Democrats to take back the Senate majority. But we're a top target for Donald Trump and his cronies, especially after he lost the state by just one and a half points in 2016. With outside money pouring in at any second to defeat Tina, any sort of slip up now could give Republicans the advantage they so desperately want. So, we’re extending the deadline for _48 hours_ — and we’re asking: **Can Tina count on you to rush a donation of $10 or more to help us catch up on last night’s missed goal? Help us make up for this temporary lapse in the next 48 hours, but only if you can. clean_body: | These are difficult times, so please only donate if you can afford to do so. Just knowing you opened this email in the first place makes us grateful. Thank you. Folks, we’ve spent all morning tallying up the numbers after closing the books on our end-of-month fundraising deadline last night, and we have some bad news: We missed the goal. Here's why that matters: Minnesota is a must-win state for Democrats to take back the Senate majority. But we're a top target for Donald Trump and his cronies, especially after he lost the state by just one and a half points in 2016. With outside money pouring in at any second to defeat Tina, any sort of slip up now could give Republicans the advantage they so desperately want. So, we’re extending the deadline for 48 hours — and we’re asking: Can Tina count on you to rush a donation of $10 or more to help us catch up on last night’s missed goal? Help us make up for this temporary lapse in the next 48 hours, but only if you can. Every dollar makes a difference.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The ground is always shifting beneath our feet as we fight to take back the Senate majority and win our race. A missed goal like this could be enough to give Trump and the GOP the boost they need. Let's make sure we do our part to support Tina and help bring Democrats across the finish line. Thanks. — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **-May 1, 2020-** **-Three days left to register to vote in the June 2 primary-** **** We're facing the most important election of our lives. It's imperative that every voter makes their voice heard in the 2020 election. So, make sure everyone you know is registered to vote by May 4! _There are three ways to register to vote:_
1. Register online _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342474/190924832/-1499154792?emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=)**_ if you have an Indiana driver's license or ID.
2. You can print the **_[Voter Registration Application](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342476/190924834/629425687?emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=)_** and mail in the form. Any registration form postmarked on or before May 4 can be accepted if the voter is otherwise eligible.
3. You can call your county clerk. If their office is open, you can ask to pick up the form and complete it

Don't forget every single Hoosier voter is able to vote by mail in the 2020 primary. For detailed instructions on how to register to vote and vote by mail, check out our _**[blog post](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342478/190924836/-893062011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)**_ on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. **-Voting by mail just got a whole lot easier-** **** This week the Election Division opened up their online portal to apply to vote by mail. This means even more Hoosiers can vote safely in the June 2 primary. You can find the online application by clicking "Visit my Voter Portal" _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342480/190924841/629425687?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)**_. If you're looking for detailed instructions on how to apply online, we've got you covered. Read our short _[**blog post**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342481/190924858/-893062011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_ on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. Watch our **_[40-second video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342482/190924868/-803653937?v=kFqDNuHk3ms&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_** on how to apply to vote by mail online. Or check out the Vote-by-Mail Flowchart in **_[English](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342483/190924869/773508790?type=3&theater&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_** or **_[español](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342484/190924870/1786243407?type=3&theater&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)_**. _Vote-by-mail outreach is funded by our 100%-grassroots backed,**[Vote-by-Mail Outreach Initiative](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342485/190924871/1745149176?refcode=FFF5.1&amount=10.10&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=)**. You help us make sure every Hoosier has the tools to vote by mail **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342486/190924872/1745149176?refcode=FFF5.1&amount=10.10&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=)**._ **-Union stands up for workers-** **** The UFCW (United Food and Commercial Workers) 700 [wrote a letter to Gov. Holcomb](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342487/190924873/1937060253?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) encouraging him to implement protections for essential workers. They requested things like enforced physical distancing, respirators, testing, mandatory paid quarantine, and protecting workers who take sick leave from retaliation. We are nearly two months into Indiana's COVID-18 response, and workers are still receiving scant protections. It's time Holcomb put the health of essential workers first. **-Indiana at the bottom of the nation for testing-** **** This week, Indiana reached yet another record number of new cases. But testing remains remarkably low. On Monday, the Trump administration put Indiana in the [bottom ten states](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342488/190924874/-1436424866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) in the nation for testing. The data indicates that Indiana is testing 300-400 people per 1,000, while several other states are reaching numbers above 900. The Holcomb administration claims that this is due to a [shortage of testing supplies](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342489/190924875/1767634043?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535). The truth is that the testing shortage is a problem that numerous other governors have been able to solve. At this point, Ohio is slated to run [more tests in a day](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342490/190924876/-720861308?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) than Indiana runs in a week. You can help us urge Holcomb to get Hoosiers the tests they need by signing on _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17342491/190924877/511822457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTk1ZmQ1Mi1lNjhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4euA_BM-psKvlCuXN0VL46flZSDin1Jydfx9Dhi0-4=&emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b595fd52-e68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)**_. **-Holcomb and Pence aren't following public health guidelines- ** **** Gov. Holcomb has encouraged all Hoosiers to wear masks in public spaces. But when he met with Mike Pence on Thursday, he made sure to follow the Pence approach to public health: ignoring medical professional's guidelines. Pence has been spotted going maskless numerous times since the COVID-19 outbreak. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -May 1, 2020- -Three days left to register to vote in the June 2 primary- ** We're facing the most important election of our lives. It's imperative that every voter makes their voice heard in the 2020 election. So, make sure everyone you know is registered to vote by May 4! There are three ways to register to vote: 1. Register online = if you have an Indiana driver's license or ID. 2. You can print the = and mail in the form. Any registration form postmarked on or before May 4 can be accepted if the voter is otherwise eligible. 3. You can call your county clerk. If their office is open, you can ask to pick up the form and complete it Don't forget every single Hoosier voter is able to vote by mail in the 2020 primary. For detailed instructions on how to register to vote and vote by mail, check out our on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. -Voting by mail just got a whole lot easier- This week the Election Division opened up their online portal to apply to vote by mail. This means even more Hoosiers can vote safely in the June 2 primary. You can find the online application by clicking "Visit my Voter Portal" . If you're looking for detailed instructions on how to apply online, we've got you covered. Read our short on everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary. Watch our on how to apply to vote by mail online. Or check out the Vote-by-Mail Flowchart in or . Vote-by-mail outreach is funded by our 100%-grassroots backed,=. You help us make sure every Hoosier has the tools to vote by mail =. -Union stands up for workers- The UFCW (United Food and Commercial Workers) 700 encouraging him to implement protections for essential workers. They requested things like enforced physical distancing, respirators, testing, mandatory paid quarantine, and protecting workers who take sick leave from retaliation. We are nearly two months into Indiana's COVID-18 response, and workers are still receiving scant protections. It's time Holcomb put the health of essential workers first. -Indiana at the bottom of the nation for testing- This week, Indiana reached yet another record number of new cases. But testing remains remarkably low. On Monday, the Trump administration put Indiana in the in the nation for testing. The data indicates that Indiana is testing 300-400 people per 1,000, while several other states are reaching numbers above 900. The Holcomb administration claims that this is due to a . The truth is that the testing shortage is a problem that numerous other governors have been able to solve. At this point, Ohio is slated to run than Indiana runs in a week. You can help us urge Holcomb to get Hoosiers the tests they need by signing on . -Holcomb and Pence aren't following public health guidelines- Gov. Holcomb has encouraged all Hoosiers to wear masks in public spaces. But when he met with Mike Pence on Thursday, he made sure to follow the Pence approach to public health: ignoring medical professional's guidelines. Pence has been spotted going maskless numerous times since the COVID-19 outbreak. He has even shown up bare-faced in high-risk areas like . While Holcomb can be seen wearing a mask during his photo-op waiting for the Vice President, the two were later spotted schmoozing at the steps of Pence's plane . It seems like Gov. Holcomb is willing to ignore his own public health guidelines to impress his science-denying predecessor, Mike Pence. -We want to hear from you- Across the state, Hoosiers are feeling the impact of COVID-19. Too often, the experience told on the news isn't reflective of every community. We want to ensure we hold legislators accountable, and every community has access to the resources to rebuild. And we want to hear from you. You can help by completing this quick = to help us understand how your community and family have been impacted by COVID-19. -Resources- You have 3 DAYS to register to vote in the June 2 primary. Register to vote by May 4 online . You have 20 DAYS to apply to vote by mail in the June 2 primary. Apply by May 21 online . Still have questions on voting in the 2020 primary? Read our short on everything you need to know. Need a hand applying to vote by mail? Check out the for deadlines and instructions on registering to vote, applying to vote by mail, and mailing in your ballot. Watch our on how to apply to vote by mail online. You can also find a video on how to fill out a mail-in application to vote by mail =. ¿Hablas español? ¿Quieres votar por el correo? Tenemos un diagrama para ti . Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? We have created a running list of = across our state . -Save the date- Cass County: \- Every Saturday, 9-10 AM EST, Virtual Dekalb County: \- May 2, 6-6:40 PM EST, Zoom meeting Vanderburgh County, \- May 5, 7-8 PM CDT, Virtual Southside Democrat Club, , May 5, 7-8 EST PM, Zoom meeting Vanderburgh County,, May 12, 8 PM CDT, Virtual Cass County: \- May 12, 6-7 PM EST, Virtual Allen County: \- May 16, 10-11 AM EST, Virtual Cass County: \- May 21, 5-6 PM EST, Virtual Cass County: \- May 21, 6-7 PM EST, Virtual Tippecanoe County: \- May 21st, 6:30-7:30 PM EST, Zoom meeting Allen County: \- May 22, 6-7 PM EST, Fort Wayne | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. body:

Our outreach is geared towards getting the Admiral's message out to voters and ensuring they know what you know: about his exceptional leadership experience, his depth of legislative knowledge, and his deep rural roots. **But I can 't get his message out without your help. name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Digital Day Of Action Tomorrow!
body:
Will you participate?
Fellow Democrat,
📱💻🖥💙Join us tomorrow for our first Digital Day of Action! We will be sharing information and engaging with Democrats across the state! Share our posts and graphics on your County Dem pages or your personal pages! Be sure you follow us on Instagram, Twitter and Facebook: @WVDemocrats!
We will be taking the following actions:
1. 📱Join Our Adopt A Voter Program to volunteer to call, text, email or send postcards to fellow Democrats across the state!
2. 💻 Register your friends and neighbors to vote, check their registration to ensure they receive their Absentee Ballot Info and materials, and be sure new voters are registered by the deadline on May 19!
3. 🗳 Vote Absentee! Now more than ever we need to be safe. Democrats can be safe and successful in 2020 by voting with an Absentee Ballot!

name: Young Kim
subject: A year ago yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
A year ago yesterday we launched our campaign to take back this seat and fight for all Californians.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016VCu7MfZ2j9FpsO65-EtkXIvKHC8jEgOXj3cMaV3NoWDk94hLHgbIlm0oD-t817TnmKwJQk-n0QBMfNb28PtpowbCeJFKL8Zoz_eGQ9Klqls4WlhuS-cn9p9ZinwWXDt_CEU0upMLCuUUB165yBQt0u8-Tp0Pvs1VTuLNdz2AixqipVdTVih5Iu-inhM-zf3zsKg9ZoJ2IlEoLC7lkAa36-nJ73Vnkq4uL5RlujIfNEwoS3E-qTacgrWEYDrEsuxCkJIq0MkOLYd7A4NClBUHak86pr6ReoqAB1ABrwxKFMJRH8AGmNhcUitTKILHA4HNyDVUQ0wFQML4DfKwC7MAu2wxK1FHvoNaKAZoGf66KZnZpY8kWw3JoE0PO6LDaZeAuA1t4JcQtw=&c=dvkC5cjz4d0BfX1qSPgWOvRDDW3-frUB6SgPysizhcCIa8fL9fDGUA==&ch=gB102Pw153S-xGZBFFe8sqQv23UHi5z_67GQnQaOXuy_2QtvRGL5GA==) Yesterday marked one year since we launched this campaign, Friend, and I couldn't be prouder of what we've accomplished:

**We 've run a grassroots operation** \-- proving we have the support of Californians behind us.
**We WON our primary** \-- even defeating our self-funded, liberal opponent.

Now, we're only 187 days away from November's election. Things look a lot different than they did this time last year, but what's most important remains the same:

**We 're fighting to give Californians a voice** \-- restoring common-sense leadership to Congress.
**We 're fighting to take back the House for Republicans** \-- putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda.

So whether you're new to the team or you've been here since day one, I wanted to say thank you. We're facing one of the toughest races in the nation and we would not be where we are without your help.

[**Can you chip in $5 to our November Victory Fund right now?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016VCu7MfZ2j9FpsO65-EtkXIvKHC8jEgOXj3cMaV3NoWDk94hLHgbIlm0oD-t817TevpP8MZnuH-2C8uMb4fYCRd_8RB5WsXFmsL8N5OpUeinG8bObDeQfMHs1KAEGJ05EZxC6cAlqiFJGUZ0-XhP7FbOIoBdTTqOogXkjUvp0kQ18UuaQyrbPdpbN5Scuxgv8PfyBiTURgd74JJQWVlxzDUKieqBbqc7x7NZEZYdpbL046oZ6eDyDBzaoPUdCbIp4vDjSTP8r6sBDt0yZNx1cYKERuN6Nv8nu1p_93qNSyl9fhTc9dak84-Zl1e72DHH5iPDqUtmHapYvr8cwn2-3i62mXgMGxzuP4SYZRX47LfzkqYVxeh6Bm7oTjqptaNcJaH9kPWzn2E=&c=dvkC5cjz4d0BfX1qSPgWOvRDDW3-frUB6SgPysizhcCIa8fL9fDGUA==&ch=gB102Pw153S-xGZBFFe8sqQv23UHi5z_67GQnQaOXuy_2QtvRGL5GA==)

body:

name: Team Booker
subject: For all you do: thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
This team is incredible. Friends, This is just a short note saying thank you. We're feeling thankful as we begin this new month -- thankful for the many messages of support, the thousands of signatures on Cory's birthday card to wish him a happy birthday this week, and all of the ways that this team is giving back during these challenging times. We're building something special here: a movement that emphasizes the grassroots power of person-to-person connections. We're rejecting the notion that wealthy corporate donors get to call the shots. We're refusing to let special interests drown out our voices. And we're doing it the best and only way we know how: **together**. Even though the coronavirus has forced us to pull back from the physical campaign trail and change some things about our campaign, we're still as committed as ever to staying connected with the people who make our movement possible. And it's because of supporters like you that we are able to put in the important work needed to keep Cory in the Senate this November. Today's message is simple: thank you. Thank you for all you do to power this team and this movement. Thank you for helping us figure out new and innovative ways to stay connected in the face of this changing reality. And thank you for everything you do to support Cory while he fights for us every day in the Senate. We're so grateful you're on our team. Team Booker | [DONATE](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e2d/5fca0d19/7dbd40d7/291d6434/4206717499/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200501-ty?refcode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em200501&source=em200501")
---

name: Shayne Cheshire
subject: thank you and an invite for you, friend.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
I was so heartened to see that when we asked for your support, you all answered the call with generosity. Especially in these uncertain times, your help is vital to bringing positive change to Southwest Florida and across the state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17344164/190958951/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYThlNjllNC1mMzhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGz73NnZqC9SxI_OeEFc6TY27STuS8LVIRshdlW4RtU=&emci=39419c39-e88b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aa8e69e4-f38b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Team,

I was so heartened to see that when we asked for your support, you all answered the call with generosity. Especially in these uncertain times, your help is vital to bringing positive change to Southwest Florida and across the state.

Make no mistake about it: _The votes we need to flip this district will allow the Democrats to take back Florida in November._

Your donations go a long way to ensuring that our campaign has the resources to keep fighting for progress for our communities — because we deserve a representative who understands that solving our community’s challenges takes hard work, creative problem solving, and listening to the people you serve.

That's why I'm excited to be a part of this campaign and why we need your support.

We also want to invite you to an exciting event with former State Representative and former Democratic Nominee for Florida Attorney General, **Sean Shaw** , at 2 PM tomorrow, Saturday, May 2nd. I worked for Rep. Shaw on his last campaign, and I can tell you firsthand, he is one of the most engaging, smart, and energetic people I know. I am looking forward to the conversation between Rep. Good and him and hope you will be able to join us!

**[Click here to RSVP to this engaging conversation where Margaret and Sean will explore the issues facing our communities, Florida, and our nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17344165/190958952/1638746364?contactdata=mkxKQT3ydm2ULPHEU%2BAiZSLe78UyWnNJGq%2FyBmEysPK%2BjjzcDIvkW0KHTXQUm5pk3L8PR1kmHorSfJbNAriWxK2B7koSXLjRdIaE3ecSAHqBLpeGPxjGD1TpDXz4Hw27w4GdIg2QW1F8kWeqlK%2BhWQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYThlNjllNC1mMzhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGz73NnZqC9SxI_OeEFc6TY27STuS8LVIRshdlW4RtU=&emci=39419c39-e88b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=aa8e69e4-f38b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

Again, I thank you for your continued support. Together, we will win this election and bring positive change to Florida!

Shayne Cheshire
Finance Director | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17344166/190958953/788213855?refcode=em05012020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYThlNjllNC1mMzhiLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGz73NnZqC9SxI_OeEFc6TY27STuS8LVIRshdlW4RtU=)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: We have Campaign Facemasks!!!
body:
I’ve been working with a supporter of mine who owns, Yippy, a tech company that supports Free Speech and shares our same desire to break up big tech.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374205-880134-4979878-19348cf63a-558d99394f)
Patriot,

I’ve been working with a supporter of mine who owns Yippy, a tech company that supports Free Speech, President Trump, and shares our same desire to break up big tech.

We both wanted to help American business owners who are currently suffering as a result of COVID-19, while simultaneously supporting Conservative values and keeping Americans safe.

We were able to find a textile manufacturer located in California that is owned by second-generation Korean Christian Americans.

This business owner shifted production to make 100% American-Made REUSEABLE AND CUSTOM Facemasks, and I now have Laura Loomer for Congress facemasks in stock!

[**Check them out!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374205-880134-4979877-b454f1433b-558d99394f)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374205-880134-4979877-b454f1433b-558d99394f)
As we venture out in public, you can be doing double-duty by protecting yourself and others while also supporting my campaign!

To cover costs and shipping, [**with a donation of $19**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374205-880134-4979877-b454f1433b-558d99394f), we’ll rush your mask to your door.

[**Order today and we’ll do our best to get them in the mail ASAP!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-374205-880134-4979877-b454f1433b-558d99394f)

Thanks so much for all that you do and for your ongoing support!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-374205-880134-84585d41bbe610b-558d99394f)

---

* * *
The cracks are emerging in solid-red Senate seats like my home state of South Carolina. **We 're proving that Democrats have the opportunity to change the face of leadership in this country.**
When I started my run for Senate, folks said I'd have no chance of ousting Lindsey Graham ... but within months of firing up my grassroots base we're proving the critics wrong!
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04c4/72412298/4f9ef369/61048c2d/3724518327/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfaGFycmlzb25zcGxpdF9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUwMV9IYXJyaXNvbjJfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_harrisonsplit_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200501_Harrison2_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200501_Harrison2_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200501_Harrison2_U1_X1")

name: Tom Cotton
subject: BREAKING: Biden refuses to release records
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:

name: Team Messner
subject: This week: term limit pledge, Dave Wheeler and Gates Lucas endorsements, China, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/63ec33cf6667dc36c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Corky Messner Pledges Support for Term Limits; Decries ‘Professional Politicians’ Like Jeanne Shaheen**
Corky Messner this week pledged to only serve two terms if elected, arguing that “professional politicians” like incumbent Jeanne Shaheen have lost touch with the very people they were elected to represent.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/2de5b4e919b2ac24c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
“Serving in public office should be a calling, not a lifelong career,” says Corky. “Our Founding Fathers wisely recognized the importance of citizen legislators, who would serve in office for a limited amount of time, then return to private life and live under the very laws they enacted.”

Corky signed a term-limit pledge through U.S. Term Limits (USTL), a grassroots organization supporting term limits at all levels of government and seeking a Constitutional amendment for Congressional term limits.

“Jeanne Shaheen is a privileged member of a professional political class, who has been on the public payroll for decades. What does she know about the lives of ‘regular’ citizens who have to earn a living, run a business, pay rent and feed their families?” asks Corky. “The majority of Americans support term limits, specifically for members of Congress, since they understand they’re the only way to get Senators and Representatives productive and responsive to the electorate.

“Politicians like Jeanne Shaheen spend decades in office and become beholden to political pals, big-buck donors, and pandering lobbyists who keep their campaigns well-funded and focused on special interests...and not on the average constituent.”
|
---
**In The News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/dbe1f5134a54a99bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
WMUR’s Primary Source announced our latest endorsements: former Executive Councilor Dave Wheeler of Milford and State Representatives Gates Lucas, who has been named chair of the campaign’s Millennial Steering Committee, Keith Murphy, Deborah Hobson and David Milz. [**Read more**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/b068f08549167182c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**A Video Show of Support**
State Rep. Gates Lucas this week endorsed Corky, and showed his support with [**this video**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/2e76d6b6f3e07d81c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Gates also has been named chair of our Millennial Steering Committee, and will work with Corky to inform and engage young voters across New Hampshire. Welcome aboard, Gates – and thank you!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/6f4ee0db8d3a85f4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Congress Must Hold China Accountable**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/84fabc439b7bed1cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Evidence is increasing that COVID-19 originated in a Chinese laboratory. The Chinese Communist government has engaged in a massive cover up, lied to the public and needs to be held accountable. Corky is urging Granite Staters to demand action from Congress right now, so **[send your message of support](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/ff546b9e69386aecc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** today!
|
---
**Upcoming Events – Check Our Website!**
We continue our Tele-Town Halls and other virtual events. Check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky your questions.

Upcoming Tele-Town Halls
Dial 603-506-4097

Tuesday, May 5, at 6:30 p.m.
Thursday, May 7, at 1 p.m.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/34ba2c5e315b2c85/ca4ffc8a1001eb73c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---

clean_body: Tap or click to read more >> Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | | Corky Messner Pledges Support for Term Limits; Decries ‘Professional Politicians’ Like Jeanne Shaheen Corky Messner this week pledged to only serve two terms if elected, arguing that “professional politicians” like incumbent Jeanne Shaheen have lost touch with the very people they were elected to represent. “Serving in public office should be a calling, not a lifelong career,” says Corky. “Our Founding Fathers wisely recognized the importance of citizen legislators, who would serve in office for a limited amount of time, then return to private life and live under the very laws they enacted.” Corky signed a term-limit pledge through U.S. Term Limits (USTL), a grassroots organization supporting term limits at all levels of government and seeking a Constitutional amendment for Congressional term limits. “Jeanne Shaheen is a privileged member of a professional political class, who has been on the public payroll for decades. What does she know about the lives of ‘regular’ citizens who have to earn a living, run a business, pay rent and feed their families?” asks Corky. “The majority of Americans support term limits, specifically for members of Congress, since they understand they’re the only way to get Senators and Representatives productive and responsive to the electorate. “Politicians like Jeanne Shaheen spend decades in office and become beholden to political pals, big-buck donors, and pandering lobbyists who keep their campaigns well-funded and focused on special interests...and not on the average constituent.” | In The News WMUR’s Primary Source announced our latest endorsements: former Executive Councilor Dave Wheeler of Milford and State Representatives Gates Lucas, who has been named chair of the campaign’s Millennial Steering Committee, Keith Murphy, Deborah Hobson and David Milz. | A Video Show of Support State Rep. Gates Lucas this week endorsed Corky, and showed his support with Gates also has been named chair of our Millennial Steering Committee, and will work with Corky to inform and engage young voters across New Hampshire. Welcome aboard, Gates – and thank you! | Congress Must Hold China Accountable Evidence is increasing that COVID-19 originated in a Chinese laboratory. The Chinese Communist government has engaged in a massive cover up, lied to the public and needs to be held accountable. Corky is urging Granite Staters to demand action from Congress right now, so today! | Upcoming Events – Check Our Website! We continue our Tele-Town Halls and other virtual events. Check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky your questions. Upcoming Tele-Town Halls Dial 603-506-4097 Tuesday, May 5, at 6:30 p.m. Thursday, May 7, at 1 p.m. | IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO Once again, here’s a list of resources for Granite Staters in need of assistance or information. Please do all you can to keep yourself, your family and friends, and your community healthy – and remember to support local businesses! HEALTH INFORMATION White House Guidelines: 30 Days to Slow the Spread – . New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – . New Hampshire Division of Public Health Services – . For general assistance, a 211 site to locate resources – . Centers for Disease Control: What to do if you are sick with coronavirus disease – . RESOURCES FOR BUSINESSES/EMPLOYMENT NH Department of Employment Security Due to COVID-19, all claims and questions should be directed to or call the Unemployment Assistance Hotline at 603-271-7700. How to Home School Your Children – . FOR ASSISTANCE – FOOD Meals on Wheels – . NH Food Bank – . School Food and Nutrition Service – . HOW YOU CAN HELP NH Food Bank – . name: James Mackler
subject: Do you think it's safer to stay at home?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I need to know what you think.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa171/18d6a294/4cb826d0/26d60cc1/214097874/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | I'm so grateful -- It's because of the generosity of this grassroots team that we were able to reach our April goal. Our success last month is a testament to what we can accomplish when we work together. And that's exactly what our communities are doing right now -- we're all contributing however we can to keep each other safe and healthy, including staying home to help flatten the curve. **But Gov. Bill Lee has made the dangerous decision to let Tennessee 's stay-at-home order expire yesterday.** Lee declining to extend the stay-at-home order comes just days after our state had its largest single-day spike in new cases of COVID-19 and in spite of the warnings from health organizations that hospital capacity could be exhausted by mid-June if we ease up on social distancing. **This decision affects us all, and I need to know what you think.** [_**DO YOU AGREE WITH GOV. LEE 'S DECISION TO LET TENNESSEE'S STAY-AT-HOME ORDER EXPIRE?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa171/18d6a294/4cb826d0/26d60cce/214097874/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "http://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200501p_nd") | | [YES ->](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa171/18d6a294/4cb826d0/26d60ccf/214097874/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200501p_nd") | | [NO ->](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa171/18d6a294/4cb826d0/26d60cce/214097874/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "http://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200501p_nd")
---|---|---
In service,
James

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Injustice compounds injustice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390679/55b66746/20000b40/80e548a/3764972230/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | This headline has us enraged: **"Massachusetts communities with dirty air are coronavirus hotspots"**
_Boston Globe_ The fact is, decades-long policy failures are deepening the pain of this virus. Decades-long environmental injustice has a direct effect on those bearing the brunt of this disease in our state. Frontline communities like Chelsea, Brockton, Everett, Lynn, Randolph, and Lawrence are more likely to be near petrochemical sites or other areas of unhealthy pollution levels. These communities have been left out of the national conversation for too long. As a result, they've gone without -- without the help they need to combat pollution affecting their health, without the protections they need for their next generations, and without the tools to combat painful devastation from the coronavirus today. This is not a coincidence. Injustice compounds injustice -- we need leadership in the U.S. Senate that acknowledges this and is willing to take these injustices head-on. We cannot and will not allow the erasure of frontline communities to continue. That's why Joe introduced the Environmental Justice for All Act with his colleagues. It's why he is a leading voice on this issue. Because he always shows up for those hit first and worst. **Joe is in this race to lift up the voices of those who have too long gone underprotected and underserved.[ If you are financially able at this moment, would you consider pitching in $3 to help fuel our campaign so we can ensure we have a leader in the Senate who will fight for frontline communities?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390679/55b66746/20000b40/80e548b/3764972230/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-05-01-enviro&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode2=ask3-btn5")** Chelsea, Brockton, Everett, Lynn, Randolph, and Lawrence--and communities like them across this country--deserve justice. Joe will show up for those communities. In Massachusetts and in the United States Senate. Let's keep fighting. Team Kennedy |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390679/55b66746/20000b40/80e5494/3764972230/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.

name: Thank you [via @ 314 Action Fund]
subject: Thank you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| We all know the stakes this year. It's not hyperbole to say this is the most important election of our lifetimes. That is why we wanted to thank you for stepping up and helping us reach our end-of-month goal -- it means a lot and will be critical to flipping the Senate.

**_Despite the hard work we are putting in, we can 't afford to rest. Just look at news:_**

[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4a39/4bd7760e/5b018e0a/77af12e2/2214580009/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200501_1MO_STD_1_TrumpArizona&source=314_EM_FR_200501_1MO_STD_1_TrumpArizona&refcode=314_EM_FR_200501_1MO_STD_1_TrumpArizona")
Amid a global pandemic, Trump is jetting off to Arizona to desperately try and help save Martha McSally in her race against Astronaut Mark Kelly.

**_He 's scared because he knows his leadership is costing the GOP the Senate -- so he's going to try and stop the progress we've made in Arizona FIRST._**

[Can you chip in to help Mark Kelly fight back against Trump's visit before it's too late?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4a39/4bd7760e/5b018e0a/77af12e1/2214580009/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+chip+in+to+help+Mark+Kelly+fight&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200501_1MO_STD_1_TrumpArizona&source=314_EM_FR_200501_1MO_STD_1_TrumpArizona&refcode=314_EM_FR_200501_1MO_STD_1_TrumpArizona")

name: MJ Hegar Battleground HQ
subject: Getting real work done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
With a Senate in gridlock, we've got to get Mitch McConnell OUT OF THERE.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c5/7f51f7bc/4fd66027/4ef1657c/3519564929/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Listen up, Peter: Texas is a linchpin in flipping the Senate and making sure that Sen. Cornyn's DC boss, Mitch McConnell, is no longer able to hold up critical legislation -- like the commonsense gun safety bill that's been sitting on McConnell's desk as shooting after shooting has devastated our country.

The House has passed important legislation, but crucial bills they've sent to Mitch McConnell just sit waiting to be voted on as **he and his cronies, Sen. Cornyn included, put politics over people and refuse to do their jobs. [Donate to make sure that Mitch McConnell no longer controls the legislative process!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c5/7f51f7bc/4fd66027/4ef16576/3519564929/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200501.2nd__1329__&amount=10")** | **Flipping the Senate means:**
* **Protecting and expanding access to health care**
* **Combating climate change**
* **Taking on Big Pharma**
* **Finally taking steps to protect our communities from gun violence**
* **Taking on unfair business practices**
* **Keeping our leaders accountable**

---
There are so many crucial laws that we just won't see passed as long as Mitch McConnell controls which bills get a vote -- so please [**donate to help flip the Senate for a new Senate majority leader who 'll put people before their special interest donors.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c5/7f51f7bc/4fd66027/4ef16576/3519564929/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200501.2nd__1329__&amount=10")

\-- Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c5/7f51f7bc/4fd66027/4ef16576/3519564929/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200501.2nd__1329__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c5/7f51f7bc/4fd66027/4ef16575/3519564929/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1329&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c5/7f51f7bc/4fd66027/4ef16574/3519564929/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
US Passes South Korea in Virus Testing as Trump Unveils Expanded Effort | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68f192e04b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**US Passes South Korea in Virus Testing as Trump Unveils Expanded Effort**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7177106ac&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“The United States has passed South Korea, considered the gold standard by the media, in testing for the coronavirus, and, in hot spots like New York City, has done several times more per capita than the Asian nation,” Paul Bedard reports. More than 5 million tests have been conducted in America so far—a figure that continues to grow quickly.

🎬**Vice President Pence:** [A day will come when we put this epidemic in the past](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=400c0aff58&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Second Round Of SBA’s Paycheck Protection Program Processed Nearly $50 Billion In Loans In First 24 Hours**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f7d063e2b&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Caller_
“The second round of the Small Business Administration’s (SBA) Payment Protection Program (PPP) processed in 24 hours nearly twice the total dollar amount of loans the administration processes in the average year,” Christian Datoc reports. “The SBA granted roughly 450,000 loans from 5,100 lenders for a total sum of $48.5 billion.”

🎬**Admiral Giroir:** [Safely reopening our economy is just what the doctor ordered](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4690588875&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Special Needs Employee Saved by PPP Loan Thanks Trump: 'We're Not Broken' and Neither is America**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b95e22c22&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump and daughter Ivanka Trump hosted an event at the White House Tuesday inviting small business owners from across the country,” Yael Halon reports. Amy Wright, owner of a coffee chain that employs individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities, praised the President’s strong small business relief program.

**🇺🇸****President Trump:** [We will rebuild the world’s greatest economy!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8283ef0c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**The FBI’s Flynn Outrage**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f3b0bba2a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The newest Federal Bureau of Investigation documents in the case of former White House national security adviser Mike Flynn are stunning in themselves. But the totality of Mr. Flynn’s treatment shocks the conscience,” Kimberly Strassel writes. “The FBI exists to investigate crimes, not to create them . . . This is law enforcement abusing its most tyrannical power—to strip citizens of their reputations, their livelihoods and their liberty.”
---
|
---
| [**‘Conspiracy Theories’ and China’s Full-Court Press in American Media**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97d611cd6f&e=3ee4985eea)
_-National Review_
“Right now, a surprising number of prominent Americans are loudly insisting that China has handled this virus outbreak correctly, and the United States has not,” Jim Geraghty writes. “There is this weird wave of pro-Beijing cheerleading going on.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=613ec6bc27&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=648102fd72&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0a83f7aae0)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Need some inspiration to keep organizing? Meet Whitney ✊
body:
Our Director of Partnerships Whitney Hu shares her inspiring organizing story in this week's blog post. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8bc8b406e493/may-1-2020?e=0aad15100c)
---
|
---
| _Organizing for everyone._
---
| | | |
---
|
---
|
**This Week in Democracy:

Activist, Organizer, Candidate: Meet Team Outvote’s Whitney Hu**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=61d679d18c&e=0aad15100c)
---

In need of a little organizing inspiration? This week we're sharing the incredible activism story of Whitney Hu, Outvote's Director of Partnerships. Check out our latest blog post to learn how Whitney translated her years of grassroots organizing into a run for New York City Council.
|
---
| [Get Started](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=4044e7c763&e=0aad15100c "Get Started")
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | **What We're Reading:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=90da5f6a6b&e=0aad15100c)
---
[ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=f43aeb86b2&e=0aad15100c)
---
| [**Look to Wisconsin for Lessons on a Digital Campaign During a Pandemic**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=c70cb37e75&e=0aad15100c)

_4.14.20 | The New York Times_

A transition to digital campaigning swept Jill Karofsky to victory.
---
[**This is No Time to Play Politics with our Democracy**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=c677404096&e=0aad15100c)

_3.23.20 | ACLU_

We must fund no-excuse vote-by-mail and early in-person voting.

---

******\- adrienne maree brown**
